Memory/06_transcripts/clean\codex\2026\03\019ce282-c052-7…62726 tokens truncated…lean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__d1fbf58b.md:439:     - Important for XHS signing migration to Pinchtab evaluate
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__d1fbf58b.md:446:   - `d:\demo1\papaweb\docs\plan\统一风控对抗平台架构方案.md` (CREATED, 836 lines)
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__d1fbf58b.md:452:   - XHS signing function name inconsistency: Document used `window._webmsxyw(url, data)` but actual code uses `window.mnsv2(signStr, md5Str)`. Fixed by grep-verifying against `playwright_sign.py` and correcting the evaluate example.
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__d1fbf58b.md:458:   - Missing cross-language communication design: Orchestrator (Node.js) calling Go components had no defined protocol. Added HTTP REST architecture with all Go components consolidated into single Pinchtab process
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__d1fbf58b.md:459:   - Missing rollback strategy: Added A/B comparison approach — keep MediaCrawler running in parallel during Phase 1
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__d1fbf58b.md:466:   - Key decision: Pinchtab as sole browser engine, MediaCrawler demoted to "platform knowledge base" that gets migrated into platform adapters then retired
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__d1fbf58b.md:468:   - Key decision: single Pinchtab process hosting all Go components (proxy, challenge, identity) to avoid multi-process complexity
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__d1fbf58b.md:474:   - "我想把他们的能力结合起来，做一个更好的平台，你看看我们应该如何架构呢，这里不光是有他们两个的优势，还要有你的来补齐他俩的短板。请你深度思考一下。就是如何强化绕过第三方平台风控、验证码或签名对抗的做法。重点就是mediacrawler里面提到的这几个平台" (Combine both into a better platform, fill gaps, deep thinking on anti-risk-control architecture for MediaCrawler's platforms)
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__d1fbf58b.md:483:   The most recent work was completing the two-round review of `d:\demo1\papaweb\docs\plan\统一风控对抗平台架构方案.md`. All 13 fixes from both review rounds were applied, growing the document from 716 to 836 lines. The final summary of all fixes was delivered to the user, organized by Round 1 (structural/completeness: 5 fixes) and Round 2 (technical accuracy: 8 fixes). The document is now complete and reviewed.
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:64:## Pinchtab vs MediaCrawler 风控对比
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:66:| 能力 | MediaCrawler (Python) | Pinchtab (Go) | 胜出 |
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:68:| 浏览器指纹伪装 | stealth.min.js 注入，较基础 | 分层 stealth（light/full），canvas 噪声、WebGL、字体、硬件参数全面伪装 | Pinchtab |
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:69:| 自动化检测绕过 | Chrome 启动参数 + CDP 模式 | webdriver 隐藏 + CDP 痕迹清除 + Chrome runtime 伪造 | Pinchtab |
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:70:| 人类行为模拟 | 简单 easing 函数（主要用于滑块） | Bézier 曲线鼠标轨迹、打字模拟（含错别字+退格）、点击时序随机化 | Pinchtab |
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:71:| 指纹轮换 | 无，UA 随机选择而已 | `/fingerprint/rotate` API，按请求动态生成 | Pinchtab |
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:72:| Stealth 评分 | 无 | `/stealth/status` 实时评估+建议 | Pinchtab |
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:73:| IDPI 防御 | 无 | 域名白名单 + 内容扫描 + 安全包装 | Pinchtab |
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:74:| 代理 IP 轮换 | 完整的代理池（快代理/豌豆），自动刷新过期 IP | 无内置代理管理 | MediaCrawler |
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:75:| 滑块验证码破解 | OpenCV 模板匹配 + 人类轨迹生成 | 无 | MediaCrawler |
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:76:| 平台签名算法 | XHS 专用签名（CRC32 + Playwright 注入） | 无（通用工具，不绑定平台） | MediaCrawler |
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:81:Pinchtab 在反检测和指纹伪装方面明显更强，架构也更现代（Go、API 化、可评分）。但 MediaCrawler 有三个 pinchtab 缺失的能力：
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:104:Let我先深入看一下 MediaCrawler 支持的具体平台和签名实现。
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:127:│                  Orchestrator 编排层                  │
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:131:│     ← MediaCrawler 滑块 + 新增: 图形/短信/行为验证     │
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:134:│     ← MediaCrawler XHS签名 + 新增: 抖音/B站/快手签名   │
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:137:│     ← Pinchtab 人类模拟 + 新增: 浏览模式/停留/滚动     │
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:140:│     ← Pinchtab stealth + 新增: 一致性身份档案          │
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:143:│     ← MediaCrawler 代理池 + 新增: TLS/JA3 + HTTP/2    │
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:151:MediaCrawler 有代理池但没有 TLS 指纹管理。Pinchtab 完全没有代理。而现在抖音、小红书都在用 JA3/JA4 指纹检测 — 你用 Go 的 `net/http` 或 Python 的 `httpx` 发请求，TLS 握手特征跟真实 Chrome 完全不同，代理换再多 IP 也会被识别。
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:154:- TLS 指纹伪装（用 [utls](https://github.com/refraction-networking/utls) 或在 Pinchtab 的 chromedp 层面走真实浏览器 TLS）
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:156:- 代理池统一管理，从 MediaCrawler 移植 `proxy_ip_pool.py` 逻辑到 Go 侧，作为独立 sidecar
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:158:### L2 浏览器指纹 — Pinchtab 胜出，但缺一致性
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:160:Pinchtab 的 canvas 噪声、WebGL、字体、硬件伪装已经很好。但现在的问题是：每次轮换指纹后，各维度之间不一致。比如 UA 说 Mac + Safari，但 `navigator.platform` 返回 Win32，WebGL vendor 返回 Intel — 这种矛盾本身就是检测信号。
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:167:### L3 行为指纹 — Pinchtab 有基础，但不够深
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:169:Pinchtab 的 Bézier 鼠标、打字模拟已经不错。但平台现在检测的是更高层的行为模式：
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:181:### L4 平台签名 — MediaCrawler 只覆盖了 XHS
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:185:| 平台 | 签名机制 | MediaCrawler 现状 | 对抗策略 |
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:187:| 小红书 | x-s, x-t, x-s-common | 有 (playwright_sign + xhs_sign) | 保留，通过 Pinchtab 浏览器执行 |
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:188:| 抖音 | a_bogus, msToken, ttwid, _signature | 无 | 必须浏览器内执行 JS，不可逆向 |
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:193:| 知乎 | x-zse-96 (基于 x-zst-81) | 无 | 浏览器内执行，类似抖音 |
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:195:核心思路：放弃纯算法逆向签名，统一走 Pinchtab 浏览器执行。原因：
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:196:1. 抖音的 a_bogus 每隔几周更新混淆，纯逆向维护成本极高
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:197:2. Pinchtab 本身就是真实浏览器环境，直接在页面上下文里调用平台自己的签名函数
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:198:3. XHS 的 `window.mnsv2` 方案（MediaCrawler 已有）正好可以推广到其他平台
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:200:### L5 验证码应答 — MediaCrawler 只有滑块
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:202:MediaCrawler 的 OpenCV 滑块识别 + easing 轨迹生成是好的基础，但平台验证码类型远不止滑块：
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:206:| 滑块拼图 | XHS, 抖音 | MediaCrawler 有 | 保留，接入 Pinchtab 的 human.MouseMove |
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:220:                    │  Orchestrator    │  调度 + 身份分配
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:237:                    │   Pinchtab       │  浏览器引擎
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:257:1. Pinchtab 作为唯一浏览器引擎 — MediaCrawler 的 Playwright 层完全替换掉，签名、Cookie、页面交互全部走 Pinchtab API
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:259:2. MediaCrawler 降级为 "平台知识库" — 保留它的平台特定逻辑（签名算法、Cookie 字段、API endpoint），但执行环境换成 Pinchtab
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:263:4. Proxy Router 从 MediaCrawler 移植并增强 — 加入 TLS 指纹感知，同一身份始终走同一出口 IP（直到过期）
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:272:按风控对抗价值排序：
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:274:1. L2 身份档案一致性 + L4 签名统一走 Pinchtab — 这是最大的短板，修复后立刻提升所有平台的通过率
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:275:2. L1 代理池移植到 Go 侧 — 让 Pinchtab 原生支持代理轮换
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:305:文档完成，716 行，保存在 [统一风控对抗平台架构方案.md](docs/plan/统一风控对抗平台架构方案.md)。
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:307:覆盖了完整的五层架构（L1 网络身份 → L5 验证码应答）、7 个平台各自的签名对抗方案、Orchestrator 自适应限速设计、系统集成拓扑，以及 5 个 Phase 共约 10 周的实施路线图。
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:342:确认了，签名函数是 `window.mnsv2`。文档里写错了。批量修复所有 review 问题。
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:377:- 补充了跨语言通信架构（Go 组件统一收编进 Pinchtab 单进程，Node.js Orchestrator 通过 HTTP REST 调用）
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:378:- 补充了回退策略（Phase 1 保留 MediaCrawler 并行，A/B 对比后再切流）
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:382:- XHS 签名函数名修正：`window._webmsxyw` → `window.mnsv2(signStr, md5Str)`（经代码验证）

Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:409:   - Platform-specific signing: XHS `window.mnsv2`, Douyin `a_bogus` (browser-internal execution), Bilibili `wbi` (pure Go algorithm), Zhihu `x-zse-96` (browser-internal)
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:410:   - Core strategy: abandon pure algorithm reverse-engineering for signatures, use Pinchtab browser to execute platform's own signing JS

Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:429:     - MediaCrawler's proxy pool: ProxyIpPool class with load/validate/get/refresh cycle

Fixed by grep-verifying against `playwright_sign.py` and correcting the evaluate example.
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:458:   - Missing cross-language communication design: Orchestrator (Node.js) calling Go components had no defined protocol. Added HTTP REST architecture with all Go components consolidated into single Pinchtab process
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:459:   - Missing rollback strategy: Added A/B comparison approach — keep MediaCrawler running in parallel during Phase 1
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:466:   - Key decision: Pinchtab as sole browser engine, MediaCrawler demoted to "platform knowledge base" that gets migrated into platform adapters then retired
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:468:   - Key decision: single Pinchtab process hosting all Go components (proxy, challenge, identity) to avoid multi-process complexity
Memory/06_transcripts/clean\claude\2026\03\7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md:474:   - "我想把他们的能力结合起来，做一个更好的平台，你看看我们应该如何架构呢，这里不光是有他们两个的优势，还要有你的来补齐他俩的短板。请你深度思考一下。就是如何强化绕过第三方平台风控、验证码或签名对抗的做法。重点就是mediacrawler里面提到的这几个平台" (Combine both into a better platform, fill gaps, deep thinking on anti-risk-control architecture for MediaCrawler's platforms)

390`t### 30. user
391`t- Timestamp: `2026-03-20T08:37:17Z`
392`t
393`tThis session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.
394`t
395`tSummary:
396`t1. Primary Request and Intent:
397`t   - User initially asked to compare risk control (风控) capabilities between Pinchtab (Go, at `d:\demo1\papaweb\services\worker-fetch-browser\upstream-pinchtab`) and MediaCrawler (Python, at `d:\demo1\papaweb\services\social-adapters\upstream-mediacrawler`), and whether Pinchtab could replace MediaCrawler's risk control features.
398`t   - User then asked for a deep architectural analysis on how to combine both systems' strengths into a unified platform, filling gaps neither covers. Focus: bypassing third-party platform risk controls, CAPTCHAs, and signature countermeasures for MediaCrawler's 7 platforms (小红书, 抖音, B站, 快手, 微博, 贴吧, 知乎).
399`t   - User requested a plan document in markdown with a Chinese filename.
400`t   - User requested the document be reviewed twice ("review 2次"), and all issues found be fixed.
401`t
402`t2. Key Technical Concepts:
403`t   - Five-layer defense architecture: L1 Network Identity (proxy + TLS/JA3), L2 Browser Identity (fingerprint consistency), L3 Behavioral Identity (human simulation), L4 Platform Protocol (signing), L5 Challenge Response (CAPTCHA)
404`t   - Orchestrator layer for identity pool management, adaptive rate limiting, health monitoring
405`t   - Cross-cutting concerns: observability, account/cookie persistence (SQLite), cross-language communication (Go ↔ Node.js via HTTP REST)
406`t   - TLS fingerprint spoofing via utls (Go library) for API-direct mode
407`t   - HTTP/2 fingerprint consistency (SETTINGS frame order, WINDOW_UPDATE)
408`t   - Identity Profile: consistent fingerprint bundles (OS↔UA↔GPU↔Screen↔Memory↔Timezone↔Language↔Fonts↔TouchPoints)
409`t   - Platform-specific signing: XHS `window.mnsv2`, Douyin `a_bogus` (browser-internal execution), Bilibili `wbi` (pure Go algorithm), Zhihu `x-zse-96` (browser-internal)
410`t   - Core strategy: abandon pure algorithm reverse-engineering for signatures, use Pinchtab browser to execute platform's own signing JS
411`t   - CAPTCHA solving: slider (OpenCV template matching migrated from Python to Go), click-select (PaddleOCR HTTP sidecar), rotation (image similarity matching)
412`t   - Three-tier CAPTCHA fallback: local solver → third-party API (2Captcha/YesCaptcha) → identity cooldown
413`t   - Adaptive rate limiting with signal detection (200/429/403/CAPTCHA/empty data)
414`t   - Account warmup protocol for login-required platforms
415`t   - Go components consolidated into single Pinchtab process with new API routes (/proxy/*, /challenge/*, /identity/*)
416`t
417`t3. Files and Code Sections:
418`t   - `d:\demo1\papaweb\services\worker-fetch-browser\upstream-pinchtab\internal\handlers\stealth.go`
419`t     - Pinchtab's stealth status endpoint and fingerprint rotation handler
420`t     - Shows HandleStealthStatus (scoring), HandleFingerprintRotate (CDP-based UA/screen/hardware override), generateFingerprint (OS/browser config maps)
421`t     - Important for understanding Pinchtab's current fingerprint capabilities and gaps (no consistency validation)
422`t   
423`t   - `d:\demo1\papaweb\services\worker-fetch-browser\upstream-pinchtab\internal\human\human.go`
424`t     - Pinchtab's human-like interaction: Bézier curve MouseMove, Click with random offsets, Type with typo simulation
425`t     - Key code: cubic Bézier interpolation with control point jitter, 3% typo probability, distance-based movement duration
426`t     - Important as the foundation for L3 behavioral layer enhancements
427`t   
428`t   - `d:\demo1\papaweb\services\social-adapters\upstream-mediacrawler\proxy\proxy_ip_pool.py`
429`t     - MediaCrawler's proxy pool: ProxyIpPool class with load/validate/get/refresh cycle
430`t     - Supports KuaiDaili and WandouHTTP providers
431`t     - Important as the source for Proxy Router Go migration
432`t   
433`t   - `d:\demo1\papaweb\services\social-adapters\upstream-mediacrawler\media_platform\xhs\xhs_sign.py`
434`t     - XHS signature: custom Base64 char table, CRC32 lookup table, `mrc()` function, `b64_encode()`, `get_trace_id()`
435`t     - Important for understanding XHS x-s-common generation (pure algorithm, can be ported to Go)
436`t   
437`t   - `d:\demo1\papaweb\services\social-adapters\upstream-mediacrawler\media_platform\xhs\playwright_sign.py`
438`t     - Confirmed signing function is `window.mnsv2(sign_str, md5_str)` via grep
439`t     - Important for XHS signing migration to Pinchtab evaluate
440`t   
441`t   - `d:\demo1\papaweb\services\social-adapters\upstream-mediacrawler\tools\slider_util.py`
442`t     - Slide class: OpenCV Canny edge detection + template matching for slider gap detection
443`t     - `get_track_simple()`: acceleration/deceleration track generation
444`t     - Important as source for Challenge Solver slider module migration
445`t   
446`t   - `d:\demo1\papaweb\docs\plan\统一风控对抗平台架构方案.md` (CREATED, 836 lines)
447`t     - The main deliverable: comprehensive architecture plan document
448`t     - 12 sections covering background, 5-layer architecture, per-layer design, 7-platform signing strategies, CAPTCHA solving, orchestrator, system integration topology, 5-phase roadmap (12-14 weeks), risk assessment, success metrics
449`t     - Includes code snippets (Go structs, JS injection scripts, SQL schema), architecture diagrams (ASCII), comparison tables
450`t
451`t4. Errors and fixes:
452`t   - XHS signing function name inconsistency: Document used `window._webmsxyw(url, data)` but actual code uses `window.mnsv2(signStr, md5Str)`. Fixed by grep-verifying against `playwright_sign.py` and correcting the evaluate example.
453`t   - Typo in filename: `twoaptcha.go` → `twocaptcha.go`
454`t   - Missing fingerprint consistency rules: Added TouchPoints (desktop=0), Chrome version↔TLS fingerprint matching, AudioContext seed lifecycle
455`t   - Douyin signing approach too passive: Original only hooked `window.fetch`. Enhanced to dual strategy: A) XMLHttpRequest + fetch hook (stable), B) direct signing function exposure (performant)
456`t   - OCR integration gap: ClickSelectSolver referenced `OCREngine` interface but PaddleOCR is Python. Fixed by designing HTTP sidecar architecture (Python PaddleOCR on port :9898, Go calls via HTTP)
457`t   - Missing account pool management: Major structural gap — platforms requiring login had no account/cookie persistence design. Added full section with SQLite schema, account warmup protocol, and lifecycle management
458`t   - Missing cross-language communication design: Orchestrator (Node.js) calling Go components had no defined protocol. Added HTTP REST architecture with all Go components consolidated into single Pinchtab process
459`t   - Missing rollback strategy: Added A/B comparison approach — keep MediaCrawler running in parallel during Phase 1
460`t   - Timeline too aggressive: 10 weeks with no buffer → 12-14 weeks with 2-3 day buffer between phases
461`t   - Missing risks: Added Chrome version pinning, ongoing maintenance cost (monthly 2-3 day window), rollback risk
462`t   - Missing metrics: Added cost per successful request, platform coverage count
463`t
464`t5. Problem Solving:
465`t   - Solved the core architectural question: how to unify two systems in different languages (Go/Python) with complementary but non-overlapping capabilities
466`t   - Key decision: Pinchtab as sole browser engine, MediaCrawler demoted to "platform knowledge base" that gets migrated into platform adapters then retired
467`t   - Key decision: browser-internal JS execution for all complex signatures (Douyin, Zhihu, XHS) instead of fragile reverse-engineering
468`t   - Key decision: single Pinchtab process hosting all Go components (proxy, challenge, identity) to avoid multi-process complexity
469`t   - Identified the #1 gap neither system covers: TLS/JA3 fingerprinting, critical for Douyin and XHS detection
470`t
471`t6. All user messages:
472`t   - "我们有pinchtab风控功能和mediacrawler的风控功能对吧吗 哪个更好 我们可以改造一下 用pinchtab的功能来代替mediaclawer的对应功能吗" (Compare both systems' risk control, can pinchtab replace mediacrawler?)
473`t   - "Continue" (multiple times, requesting continuation of work)
474`t   - "我想把他们的能力结合起来，做一个更好的平台，你看看我们应该如何架构呢，这里不光是有他们两个的优势，还要有你的来补齐他俩的短板。请你深度思考一下。就是如何强化绕过第三方平台风控、验证码或签名对抗的做法。重点就是mediacrawler里面提到的这几个平台" (Combine both into a better platform, fill gaps, deep thinking on anti-risk-control architecture for MediaCrawler's platforms)
475`t   - "先形成一个plan的md文档， md文档的文件名用中文命名" (Create a plan MD document with Chinese filename)
476`t   - "review 2次" (Review the document twice)
477`t   - "继续啊" (Continue)
478`t
479`t7. Pending Tasks:
480`t   - No explicitly pending tasks. The two-round review was completed and all fixes applied. The user has not yet requested implementation of any specific phase.

All 13 fixes from both review rounds were applied, growing the document from 716 to 836 lines. The final summary of all fixes was delivered to the user, organized by Round 1 (structural/completeness: 5 fixes) and Round 2 (technical accuracy: 8 fixes). The document is now complete and reviewed.

shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.5 seconds Output: 690`tOK，那我想问一下，就是我们按照这个文稿最终的一个形态会，我们的项目会变成什么情况呢？还是只讨论不修改？ 691`t 692`t### 66. assistant 693`t- Timestamp: `2026-03-13T01:12:18Z` 694`t...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.5 seconds
Output:
690`tOK，那我想问一下，就是我们按照这个文稿最终的一个形态会，我们的项目会变成什么情况呢？还是只讨论不修改？
691`t
692`t### 66. assistant
693`t- Timestamp: `2026-03-13T01:12:18Z`
694`t
695`t按当前讨论稿，最终形态会是“**n8n式小闭环节奏 + Dify式多服务拆分**”，不是大一统脚本仓库。
696`t
697`t1. 架构上：从“脚本驱动”变成“平台驱动”。  
698`t`Airflow` 只做编排真源，`publish_worker` 成为唯一发布写口，Worker 不直写 ClickHouse。
699`t
700`t2. 服务上：一个服务一个容器，按层运行。  
701`t基础层（PostgreSQL/Valkey/SeaweedFS）+ 采集层（Crawlab/Pinchtab/Workers）+ 编排层（Airflow）+ 观测层（Prometheus/Alertmanager/Grafana）。
702`t
703`t3. 仓库上：从临时脚本集合变成职责清晰的模块化结构。  
704`t`services/*`、`packages/*`、`data/*`、`infra/*` 各自边界清楚，新功能靠新增模块，不改主链路骨架。
705`t
706`t4. 数据上：会形成“三层数据面”。  
707`tRaw（证据）/Silver（结构化事实）/Gold（服务发布面），可追溯、可审计、可回放。
708`t
709`t5. 质量上：发布变成“硬门禁”。  
710`t`coverage/confidence/freshness` 不达标就不发布，不再靠人工兜底。
711`t
712`t6. 研发流程上：接入新来源会标准化。  
713`t新增来源主要改 `adapters + source-sites`，新增规则主要改 `policy-engine + policies`。
714`t
715`t7. 运维上：本地与联调用分层 Compose，生产再进 K8s。  
716`t不是现在就上复杂生产集群，而是先把闭环跑稳，再扩。
717`t
718`t8. 业务结果上：你们会得到一个可持续演进的平台底座。  
719`t后续加来源、加策略、加商业化能力时，成本和风险都可控。
720`t
721`t9. 代价也会有：  
722`t服务数变多，运维复杂度上升；但这是换稳定性、扩展性和可治理性的必要成本。
723`t
724`t这就是“最终形态”的核心。你们两份基线文档的方向也是这个目标：  
725`t[平台级采集与分析架构方案（开源可商用版）.md](D:/demo1/papaweb/docs/plan/plan0/平台级采集与分析架构方案（开源可商用版）.md)  
726`t[平台级重构架构与目录方案.md](D:/demo1/papaweb/docs/plan/plan0/平台级重构架构与目录方案.md)
727`t

3`t> 基于 Pinchtab + MediaCrawler 能力融合，构建五层纵深防御体系
4`t>
5`t> 目标平台：小红书 · 抖音 · B站 · 快手 · 微博 · 贴吧 · 知乎
6`t
7`t## 1. 背景与动机
8`t
9`t当前系统存在两套独立的风控对抗实现：
10`t
11`t| 维度 | Pinchtab (Go) | MediaCrawler (Python) |
12`t|------|---------------|----------------------|
13`t| 浏览器指纹 | 分层 stealth（light/full），canvas/WebGL/字体/硬件全面伪装 | stealth.min.js 注入，较基础 |
14`t| 自动化检测 | webdriver 隐藏 + CDP 痕迹清除 + Chrome runtime 伪造 | Chrome 启动参数 + CDP 模式 |
15`t| 人类行为模拟 | Bézier 鼠标轨迹、打字模拟（含错别字+退格）、点击时序 | 简单 easing 函数（仅用于滑块） |
16`t| 指纹轮换 | `/fingerprint/rotate` API，按请求动态生成 | 无，仅 UA 随机选择 |
17`t| 代理 IP | 无 | 完整代理池（快代理/豌豆），自动刷新过期 IP |
18`t| 滑块验证码 | 无 | OpenCV 模板匹配 + 人类轨迹生成 |
19`t| 平台签名 | 无（通用工具） | XHS 专用签名（CRC32 + Playwright 注入） |
20`t| TLS 指纹 | 无 | 无 |
21`t
22`t两者各有盲区，且无法互补。需要统一架构，融合优势并补齐短板。
23`t
24`t## 2. 五层纵深防御架构 + 横切关注点
25`t
26`t除五层纵深防御外，还有三个横切关注点贯穿所有层：
27`t
28`t- 可观测性（Observability）：每层的成功率、延迟、风控触发率实时上报
29`t- 账号与 Cookie 持久化：登录态、设备标识、Cookie 的统一存储与生命周期管理
30`t- 跨语言通信：Go 组件（Pinchtab/Proxy Router/Challenge Solver）与 Node.js Orchestrator 之间的调用协议
31`t
32`t现代平台风控是分层检测的，我们的防御也必须逐层对抗：
33`t
34`t```
35`t┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
36`t│                   Orchestrator 编排层                     │
37`t│          身份池管理 · 自适应限速 · 健康监控 · 降级策略       │
38`t├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
39`t│ L5  Challenge Response    验证码 / 人机挑战应答            │
40`t│     ← MediaCrawler 滑块 + 新增: 点选/旋转/行为验证         │
41`t├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
42`t│ L4  Platform Protocol     平台协议签名                    │
43`t│     ← MediaCrawler XHS签名 + 新增: 抖音/B站/快手/知乎签名  │
44`t├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
45`t│ L3  Behavioral Identity   行为指纹                        │
46`t│     ← Pinchtab 人类模拟 + 新增: 浏览模式/停留/滚动/闲置    │
47`t├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
48`t│ L2  Browser Identity      浏览器指纹                      │
49`t│     ← Pinchtab stealth + 新增: 一致性身份档案              │
50`t├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
51`t│ L1  Network Identity      网络指纹                        │
52`t│     ← MediaCrawler 代理池 + 新增: TLS/JA3 + HTTP/2 指纹   │
53`t└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
54`t```
55`t
56`t## 3. L1 — 网络身份层
57`t
58`t### 3.1 现状问题
59`t
60`t- MediaCrawler 有代理池但无 TLS 指纹管理
61`t- Pinchtab 完全没有代理支持
62`t- 抖音、小红书已部署 JA3/JA4 指纹检测 — Go `net/http` 或 Python `httpx` 的 TLS 握手特征与真实 Chrome 完全不同，换再多 IP 也会被识别
63`t
64`t### 3.2 设计方案
65`t
66`t#### 3.2.1 统一代理路由器 (Proxy Router)
67`t
68`t从 MediaCrawler `proxy_ip_pool.py` 移植核心逻辑到 Go，作为 Pinchtab sidecar：
69`t
70`t```
71`tpackages/proxy-router/
72`t├── pool.go           # IP 池管理（加载、验证、过期刷新）
73`t├── providers/
74`t│   ├── provider.go   # Provider 接口
75`t│   ├── kuaidaili.go  # 快代理
76`t│   ├── wandou.go     # 豌豆 HTTP
77`t│   └── static.go     # 静态 IP 列表（自建代理）
78`t├── selector.go       # 选择策略（随机/轮询/地域亲和）
79`t└── middleware.go      # HTTP 中间件，自动注入代理
80`t```

Expand full message

MemoryTree 状态
- 这个仓库的 MemoryTree 已经装好了，但活跃 goal/todo 还停留在 2026-03-20 的初始化占位状态，真正记录到的只有“启用 MemoryTree 工作流”这件事，所以这条项目线的有效记忆主要在 transcript，而不在 active goal/todo 里。[goal_v001_20260320.md](D:/demo1/papaweb/Memory/01_goals/goal_v001_20260320.md#L1) [todo_v001_001_20260320.md](D:/demo1/papaweb/Memory/02_todos/todo_v001_001_20260320.md#L1) [2026-03-20_15-14.md](D:/demo1/papaweb/Memory/03_chat_logs/2026-03-20_15-14.md#L1)

最近聊过什么
- 2026-03-12 到 2026-03-13，我们先把 papaweb 的总体方向定成“平台驱动、多服务拆分、小闭环先跑通再扩展”，明确了基础层/采集层/编排层/观测层，以及 Raw/Silver/Gold 三层数据面。随后还按这套方案做了两轮 review，并实际跑过 Stage C + Grafana 部署，健康检查通过。[019ce282...af14decb.md#L695](D:/demo1/papaweb/Memory/06_transcripts/clean/codex/2026/03/019ce282-c052-78d1-8c57-c60e5f73c710__af14decb.md#L695) [019ce282...af14decb.md#L765](D:/demo1/papaweb/Memory/06_transcripts/clean/codex/2026/03/019ce282-c052-78d1-8c57-c60e5f73c710__af14decb.md#L765)
- 2026-03-20，讨论重点转到你现在打开的这条线：先比较 Pinchtab 和 MediaCrawler 的风控能力，再决定不是简单替换，而是融合成一个统一风控对抗平台。核心结论是 Pinchtab 做唯一浏览器引擎，MediaCrawler 退为平台知识库/适配器来源，再补上五层架构 L1-L5、Orchestrator、自适应限速、账号/Cookie 持久化、Go/Node 的 HTTP REST 通信。[7a813...7081f2dd.md#L397](D:/demo1/papaweb/Memory/06_transcripts/clean/claude/2026/03/7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md#L397) [7a813...7081f2dd.md#L402](D:/demo1/papaweb/Memory/06_transcripts/clean/claude/2026/03/7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md#L402)
- 同一轮里，你要求先形成中文方案文档并 review 两次。最后产物就是现在这份 [统一风控对抗平台架构方案.md](D:/demo1/papaweb/docs/plan/统一风控对抗平台架构方案.md#L1)。当时又补了 13 个修正点，包括 XHS 签名函数改成 window.mnsv2(signStr, md5Str)、补齐账号池与 SQLite 设计、补齐跨语言通信、补 A/B 回退策略、把周期从 10 周放宽到 12-14 周。[7a813...7081f2dd.md#L446](D:/demo1/papaweb/Memory/06_transcripts/clean/claude/2026/03/7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md#L446) [7a813...7081f2dd.md#L451](D:/demo1/papaweb/Memory/06_transcripts/clean/claude/2026/03/7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md#L451) [7a813...7081f2dd.md#L482](D:/demo1/papaweb/Memory/06_transcripts/clean/claude/2026/03/7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md#L482)

和当前文档的对应
- 你现在打开的文档开头，仍然就是那次讨论的结论：先对比 Pinchtab/MediaCrawler 的能力差异，再展开五层纵深防御和三个横切关注点。[统一风控对抗平台架构方案.md#L9](D:/demo1/papaweb/docs/plan/统一风控对抗平台架构方案.md#L9) [统一风控对抗平台架构方案.md#L24](D:/demo1/papaweb/docs/plan/统一风控对抗平台架构方案.md#L24)

      "developer_instructions": "# Collaboration Mode: Default\r\n\r\nYou are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.\r\n\r\nYour active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.\r\n\r\n## request_user_input availability\r\n\r\nThe `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.\r\n\r\nIn Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.\r\n"
    }
  },
  "realtime_active": false,
  "effort": "xhigh",
  "summary": "none",
  "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md\n\n## 1) 目标\n本文件定义 `papaweb` 团队开发协作规则，适用于本地团队与所有自动化代理。\n\n## 2) 分支模型\n- `main`：生产/发布分支，只接收经过验证的发布变更。\n- `dev`：日常集成分支，所有功能先合入此分支。\n- `feature/*`：新功能分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。\n- `fix/*`：缺陷修复分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。\n- `release/*`：发布准备分支，从 `dev` 切出；验证通过后 PR 合入 `main`，随后回合 `dev`。\n- `hotfix/*`：线上紧急修复分支，从 `main` 切出，先合入 `main`，再回合 `dev`。\n\n## 3) 推送与 PR 规则（强约束）\n- 禁止直接 push 到 `main`。\n- 禁止直接 push 到 `dev`。\n- 所有日常开发变更必须通过 PR 合入 `dev`。\n- `main` 只允许来自 `release/*` 或 `hotfix/*` 的 PR。\n- 每个 PR 至少 1 名 reviewer 审核通过后才能合并。\n\n## 4) CI / E2E 准入规则\n- PR 合并到 `dev` 前，必须满足：\n- `ci` 检查通过（单元测试、静态检查）。\n- `e2e` 检查通过（端到端关键路径）。\n- 任一检查失败，禁止合并。\n- 禁止以“先合并后补测”为理由绕过。\n\n## 5) TDD（测试驱动开发）规则\n- 必须执行 `Red -> Green -> Refactor` 三步：\n- `Red`：先写测试并确认失败。\n- `Green`：写最小实现让测试通过。\n- `Refactor`：重构代码并保持测试持续通过。\n- 修复 bug 时，必须先补回归测试，再改业务代码。\n- 新增功能 PR，至少包含：\n- 1 个单元测试。\n- 1 个集成测试或 E2E 用例（覆盖主流程）。\n- 禁止删除/跳过测试来“凑绿灯”。\n\n## 6) PR 必填信息\n- 变更目的与范围。\n- 验收标准（可观察结果）。\n- 测试证据（执行命令与结果）。\n- 风险点与回滚方案。\n- 若影响使用方式，需同步更新文档。\n\n## 7) 合并策略\n- 默认使用 `Squash merge`，保持历史清晰。\n- Commit message 建议使用 Conventional Commits（如 `feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`）。\n\n## 8) 本地防护建议（必配）\n- 所有人本地安装 `pre-push` hook，拦截推送到 `main`/`dev`。\n- 推荐规则：若目标分支是 `main` 或 `dev`，直接拒绝并提示走 PR。\n\n## 9) 紧急例外流程\n- 仅 `hotfix/*` 可走紧急流程。\n- 需在 PR 描述中写明原因、风险、回滚步骤。\n- 紧急修复合入 `main` 后，必须在 24 小时内回合到 `dev` 并补齐测试。\n\n---\n\n## 10) MemoryTree 项目记忆\n\n本仓库使用 MemoryTree 管理项目级记忆，结构位于 `Memory/` 目录。\n\n### 读取顺序\n1. 本文件 `AGENTS.md`\n2. `Memory/01_goals/` 中最新的目标文件\n3. `Memory/02_todos/` 中绑定该目标的最新待办\n4. `Memory/04_knowledge/` 仅在需要时读取\n5. `Memory/03_chat_logs/` 和 `Memory/05_archive/` 仅在需要时读取\n\n### 活跃文件规则\n- `01_goals/`：目标变更需用户确认后才创建新版本，日常进展不触发新版本。\n- `02_todos/`：进度变化、里程碑推进、下一步任务变更时更新当前待办。\n- `03_chat_logs/`：仅追加，不修改或删除已有记录。\n\n## 11) MemoryTree 提交与 PR 流程\n\nMemoryTree 变更使用独立的提交和 PR 流程，不与产品代码混合。\n\n### 提交规则\n- 仅暂存 MemoryTree 管辖文件：`Memory/**` 和 `AGENTS.md`（经用户确认时）。\n- Commit 标题使用 `docs(memorytree): <描述>`，兼容本仓库 Conventional Commits 规范。\n- 禁止在同一提交中混入产品代码。\n\n### 分支与 PR\n- 使用专用分支：`memorytree/<scope>-<yyyymmdd>-<slug>`。\n- PR 目标分支遵循仓库规则（日常合入 `dev`）。\n- 仅在仓库仍执行必要审核和 CI 检查时，才可启用 auto-merge。\n\n## 12) MemoryTree 安全规则\n\n- 不得绕过本仓库的分支保护、PR 审核或 CI 准入规则。\n- 不得直接推送到 `main` 或 `dev`。\n- 若 diff 包含 MemoryTree 管辖范围外的文件，必须停下并询问用户。\n- 原始转录文件（`Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**`）在用户明确批准前不自动暂存或推送。\n",
  "truncation_policy": {
    "mode": "tokens",
    "limit": 10000
  }
}

Output:
# Heartbeat Scheduling

Use this file when MemoryTree needs to automate transcript import, cleaning, and push without human intervention or model tokens.

## Goal

Complete transcript discovery, import, cleaning, commit, and push without consuming model tokens or requiring human intervention.

## Core Rules

1. `heartbeat.py` executes once and exits. It is stateless and idempotent 鈥?safe to re-run at any interval.
2. The OS-native scheduler invokes `heartbeat.py` on a fixed interval. Use cron (Linux), launchd (macOS), or Task Scheduler (Windows).
3. One computer runs exactly one scheduled heartbeat task. Multiple registrations on the same machine are not supported.
4. Each execution scans all three supported client directories (Codex, Claude Code, Gemini CLI).
5. Each execution follows the sequence: scan 鈫?incremental import 鈫?clean 鈫?commit + push 鈫?exit.
6. The `memorytree-daemon watch` mode (continuous loop) exists only for development and debugging. Production use must rely on the OS scheduler.

## Daemon CLI

The `memorytree-daemon` command manages the heartbeat lifecycle:

| Subcommand  | Description |
|-------------|-------------|
| `install`   | Register the heartbeat task with the OS scheduler at the configured interval. Refuses to overwrite an existing registration. |
| `uninstall` | Remove the heartbeat task from the OS scheduler. |
| `run-once`  | Execute a single heartbeat cycle immediately, then exit. |
| `watch`     | Run a continuous loop for development and debugging only. |
| `status`    | Show whether a heartbeat task is registered and its last execution result. |

## OS Scheduler Integration

`memorytree-daemon install` detects the current platform and registers the heartbeat using the native scheduler:

### Linux (cron)

```text
*/5 * * * * /path/to/python /path/to/heartbeat.py >> ~/.memorytree/logs/heartbeat-cron.log 2>&1
```

Detection: check for existing entry with `crontab -l | grep memorytree`.
Removal: `crontab -l | grep -v memorytree | crontab -`.

### macOS (launchd)

Write a plist to `~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.memorytree.heartbeat.plist`:

```xml
<key>ProgramArguments</key>
<array>
  <string>/path/to/python</string>
  <string>/path/to/heartbeat.py</string>
</array>
<key>StartInterval</key>
<integer>300</integer>
```

Load with `launchctl load`, unload with `launchctl unload`.

### Windows (Task Scheduler)

```text
schtasks /create /tn "MemoryTree Heartbeat" /sc minute /mo 5 /tr "python heartbeat.py" /f
```

Detection: `schtasks /query /tn "MemoryTree Heartbeat"`.
Removal: `schtasks /delete /tn "MemoryTree Heartbeat" /f`.

## Execution Flow

1. Acquire `~/.memorytree/heartbeat.lock`. If the lock is held by a live process, exit immediately.
2. Load `~/.memorytree/config.toml`. If the file is missing or malformed, use built-in defaults and log a warning.
3. Iterate over registered projects in `config.toml`.
4. For each project: discover new transcripts 鈫?import 鈫?clean 鈫?commit. If any step fails for one project, log the error, write an alert, and continue to the next project. Never abort the entire heartbeat run because of a single project failure.
5. If `auto_push = true` and a Git remote exists, push. If the push fails, retry once. On second failure, write an alert and continue.
6. Release the lock and exit.

## Lock Mechanism

The heartbeat uses a PID-based lock file at `~/.memorytree/heartbeat.lock`:

1. On startup, check if the lock file exists.
2. If it exists, read the PID from the file. Check whether that PID is still alive (`os.kill(pid, 0)` on Unix, `OpenProcess` on Windows).
3. If the PID is alive, the lock is held 鈥?exit immediately with a `lock_held` alert.
4. If the PID is not alive (stale lock from a crashed process), delete the lock file, log a warning, and proceed.
5. Write the current PID to the lock file.
6. On exit (normal or error), always delete the lock file. Use `try/finally` to ensure cleanup.

## Error Handling

- **Per-project isolation**: A failure in one project must not prevent other projects from being processed. Catch exceptions at the project level, log the error, write an alert, and continue.
- **Failure threshold**: After 3 consecutive failures for the same project across heartbeat runs, write a `push_failed` or relevant alert to `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`. The count resets on a successful run.
- **Config errors**: If `config.toml` contains invalid values (e.g., negative interval, non-existent path), use built-in defaults for those fields and log a warning. Do not abort.
- **Git errors**: If `git add` or `git commit` fails, skip the push for that project and write an alert. Do not attempt to push uncommitted state.

## Sensitive Info Scanning

During the cleaning step, scan each transcript for patterns that match API keys, passwords, tokens, and other secrets. When a match is found:

- Log a warning with the file path and match location.
- Write an alert to `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`.
- Do **not** automatically delete or redact the content.

The user reviews alerts and decides how to handle sensitive content.

## Git Remote Pre-Check

Before pushing, verify that the target repository has a configured Git remote:

- If a remote exists, push the current branch.
- If no remote is configured, skip the push, log a warning, and write an alert to `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`.

## First Install

When the skill activates for the first time and `memorytree-daemon` is not registered, use an interactive prompt to configure the heartbeat before installing. Ask the user for:

1. Heartbeat interval (default: 5 minutes).
2. Whether `auto_push` should be enabled (default: true).
3. Confirmation of the project scope (which directories to scan).

After confirmation, run `memorytree-daemon install` with the chosen settings.

The prompt must use plain-text questions and wait for the user's reply. Do not rely on client-specific UI components (buttons, checkboxes, multi-select widgets) 鈥?the same prompt must work in Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini CLI.

Do not register the heartbeat task silently during initialization.

## On-Demand Sync

When the user asks to see their most recent conversation (e.g., "look at my last chat"), trigger an immediate sync instead of waiting for the next scheduled heartbeat:

1. Scan all three client transcript directories for the current project.
2. Incrementally import any new transcripts into the global archive and project mirror.
3. Query the global index (`sessions.jsonl` / `search.sqlite`) with `project = current directory`, sorted by timestamp descending.
4. Exclude the current session: record the skill activation timestamp when the session starts. Any transcript with `started_at` >= activation timestamp is considered the current session and excluded. This approach is cross-client and does not require knowing client-specific session IDs.
5. If no matching previous session is found, inform the user: "No previous session found for this project." Do not generate a summary.
6. Load the matched transcript and generate a continuation summary using model tokens.

The continuation summary should extract:

- What problem was being discussed.
- What approaches were tried.
- How far the work progressed.
- What remains unresolved and where it got stuck.

This path is distinct from the scheduled heartbeat: it is user-triggered, immediate, scoped to one project, and produces a model-generated summary. The scheduled heartbeat is background-only and never consumes model tokens.

See `references/transcript-archive.md` for the session continuity search flow.

## Stop And Ask

Stop and ask the user before proceeding when any of these are true:

1. The `install` subcommand would register a new OS-level scheduled task. Confirm the interval, auto_push preference, and scope first.
2. A push target has no configured Git remote.
3. An existing heartbeat registration would be overwritten by a new `install`.

## Cross-Client Compatibility

All interactive prompts in this skill (heartbeat install, configuration, on-demand sync confirmation) must work across every AI assistant that supports the skill:

1. Use plain-text questions and wait for the user's text reply. Do not use client-specific UI components.
2. Follow the user's language or the repo locale for prompt text. Do not hardcode a single language.
3. Keep script CLI interfaces uniform regardless of which client invokes them.

Output:
# Transcript Archive

Use this file when the user wants MemoryTree to preserve local AI chat history from Codex, Claude Code, or Gemini CLI.

## Goal

Keep a trustworthy transcript record by preserving the current project's transcript mirror and a synchronized global archive at the same time, without mixing unrelated projects into the current repository.

## Core Rules

1. Preserve raw transcripts unchanged as the source of truth.
2. Generate cleaned Markdown transcript indexes for discovery, lightweight review, and cross-project search.
3. Keep both the current repository mirror and the user-level global archive updated on every transcript import.
4. Keep the repository mirror scoped to the current project only. When batch discovery sees other projects, archive them in the global archive only.
5. If current-project ownership is ambiguous, treat the transcript as global-only until stronger evidence exists.
6. Ask once per repository whether raw transcript files may also be committed and pushed with MemoryTree.
7. Record that repository-specific answer in `AGENTS.md`.
8. If the answer is not an explicit yes, keep raw transcripts in the repository mirror but exclude them from automatic staging and push.
9. Use deterministic code for transcript cleaning. Do not spend model tokens to normalize transcript content when a parser script can do it.

## Import Script

Use `scripts/import-transcripts.py` for one known source file.

The script must:

1. Copy the raw transcript into the current repository mirror only when the source belongs to the current repository.
2. Copy the raw transcript into the global archive.
3. Generate the cleaned Markdown transcript in both places with deterministic code when the source matches the current repository, or in the global archive only when it does not.
4. Write manifests and update the global search index in the same operation.
5. Use a concurrency-safe global index, such as SQLite WAL mode, so multiple projects can update the global archive without corrupting it.
6. Refuse snapshot-only or otherwise content-empty sources instead of archiving empty transcript shells.
7. Treat missing or fuzzy project signals as not matched; do not mirror them into the repository on name similarity alone.

## Discovery Script

Use `scripts/discover-transcripts.py` when MemoryTree should scan the supported local client stores automatically.

The script must:

1. Discover supported transcript files from local Codex, Claude Code, and Gemini stores.
2. Mirror transcripts that belong to the current repository into both the repository and the global archive.
3. Backfill transcripts from unrelated projects into the global archive only.
4. Skip unreadable or malformed transcript files without aborting the full discovery run.
5. Skip snapshot-only or otherwise content-empty files instead of generating empty clean transcripts.
6. Keep deterministic cleaning, manifest generation, and global index updates in the same operation.
7. Support a current-project-only mode when the user wants to avoid global backfill during that run.
8. Keep ambiguous ownership cases out of the repository mirror unless path-level evidence confirms they belong to the current repo.

## Global Archive Layout

Recommended user-level layout:

```text
~/.memorytree/transcripts/
  raw/
    codex/<project>/<yyyy>/<mm>/<session-id>.jsonl
    claude/<project>/<yyyy>/<mm>/<session-id>.jsonl
    gemini/<project>/<yyyy>/<mm>/<session-id>.json
  clean/
    codex/<project>/<yyyy>/<mm>/<session-id>.md
    claude/<project>/<yyyy>/<mm>/<session-id>.md
    gemini/<project>/<yyyy>/<mm>/<session-id>.md
  index/
    sessions.jsonl
    search.sqlite
```

Path roots:

- Windows: `%USERPROFILE%`
- macOS and Ubuntu: `$HOME`

## Project Mirror Layout

Inside a repository, keep the current project's full mirror:

```text
Memory/06_transcripts/
  clean/<client>/
  manifests/
  raw/<client>/
```

Do not place other projects' transcript mirrors inside the current repository.

For the complete `~/.memorytree/` directory structure, see `references/global-configuration.md`.

## Client Sources

### Codex

- Prefer full session files from `~/.codex/sessions/**/rollout-*.jsonl`.
- Use `~/.codex/session_index.jsonl` for session discovery when helpful.
- Treat `~/.codex/history.jsonl` as lightweight history, not the preferred full transcript source.

### Claude Code

- Prefer `transcript_path` when the client exposes it.
- Otherwise prefer `~/.claude/projects/<project>/*.jsonl`.
- Treat `~/.claude/history.jsonl` as lightweight history, not the preferred full transcript source.
- Remember that local transcript retention may be limited by the client's cleanup policy.

### Gemini CLI

- Gemini transcript import is supported, but availability depends on saved chats or enabled checkpointing.
- Prefer saved chat or resume-friendly sources first.
- If checkpointing is enabled, use the checkpoint history under `~/.gemini/tmp/<project_hash>/checkpoints` and related Git snapshots under `~/.gemini/history/<project_hash>`.
- If no saved chat or checkpoint source exists, report that no importable Gemini transcript is currently available.

## Import Rules

1. Store the raw source unchanged in the global archive, and in the current repository only when the transcript belongs to that repository.
2. Compute and record a content hash for the raw file.
3. Generate a cleaned Markdown file with deterministic code, not model-generated paraphrasing.
4. During batch discovery, mirror only current-project transcripts into the repository. Unrelated projects go to the global archive only.
5. Each cleaned Markdown file must include:
   - client
   - project
   - session id
   - start time
   - cwd or repo path when available
   - branch when available
   - raw source path
   - raw content hash
6. Keep user messages, assistant messages, and useful tool summaries in the cleaned transcript.
7. Drop or fold noisy events such as queue operations, repeated metadata, telemetry, and large low-signal tool dumps.
8. Never treat the cleaned transcript as stronger evidence than the raw transcript.

## Search Rules

When the user asks to search all memories or all chat history:

1. Search `~/.memorytree/transcripts/index/search.sqlite` first for fast full-text lookup.
2. Use `sessions.jsonl` for session-level metadata filtering (client, project, date range).
3. Load the matching cleaned Markdown files for context. When exact wording matters, confirm against the raw transcript.
4. Combine transcript results with the active repository's `Memory/` files when answering.
5. If the search index does not exist, fall back to scanning the `clean/` directory directly.

## Session Continuity

When the user opens a new session and asks to see their most recent conversation, the skill provides cross-session context recovery:

1. Trigger an on-demand sync: immediately scan all three client transcript directories for the current project, bypassing the scheduled heartbeat interval. See `references/heartbeat-scheduling.md`.
2. Query the global index with `project = current directory` and `client IN (claude, codex, gemini)`, sorted by timestamp descending.
3. Exclude the current session: any transcript with `started_at` >= the skill's activation timestamp is considered the current session and excluded. This is cross-client and does not require client-specific session ID knowledge.
4. Load the located transcript: prefer cleaned Markdown for readability, confirm against raw when exact wording matters.
5. Supplement with the latest `Memory/03_chat_logs/` entry if the previous session wrote a chat log summary.
6. Generate a continuation summary (consumes model tokens) that extracts: the problem under discussion, approaches tried, progress made, and what remains unresolved.
7. Include source metadata in the output: client name, session timestamp, approximate duration.
8. If no matching previous session is found for the current project, inform the user: "No previous session found for this project." Do not generate a summary.

This feature covers all three clients. A user who worked in Codex and then opens Claude Code can recover the Codex session context, and vice versa.

## Git Rules

1. Cleaned transcript indexes may be committed as MemoryTree-owned documentation for the current repository.
2. Raw transcript files stay in the current repository mirror regardless of upload approval.
3. Raw transcript files may be staged, committed, and pushed only after the user explicitly approved raw transcript uploads for that repository.
4. Even when raw transcript uploads are approved, keep the PR limited to the current repository's transcript mirror. Do not mix transcript files from unrelated projects.

Output:
# Update Rules

Use these rules after the repo is already initialized.

## Goal Updates

Create a new goal version only when the user confirms a real requirement or scope change, such as:

- The long-term objective changed.
- Acceptance criteria changed.
- The project focus moved to a different bounded problem.

Do not create a new goal version for routine execution progress.

## Todo Updates

Update the active todo when:

- Progress changed.
- The next execution step changed.
- A milestone moved from pending to active or done.
- A new task is needed to satisfy the same goal.

Create a new todo subversion when the goal version changes or the todo structure needs a clean reset.

## Chat Log Updates

- Append only.
- Create a new chat file when the session boundary is explicit.
- If the boundary is unclear, continue the active chat file unless the repo already defines a stricter rule.
- Do not replace the active project chat log with imported raw transcripts. Use transcript imports as supporting evidence and search material.

## Knowledge Updates

Move stable, reusable information into `04_knowledge/`, for example:

- Architecture decisions
- External constraints
- Reusable operating notes
- Domain facts that should outlive a single session

## Archive Updates

Move retired or noisy context into `05_archive/` when it no longer belongs in the active files.

## Transcript Import Updates

- Preserve raw transcript files unchanged in both the current project's `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/<client>/` mirror and the global archive.
- Generate cleaned Markdown transcript indexes for discovery and lightweight review using deterministic code, not model-generated rewriting.
- Import one transcript by updating the global archive in every case, and the current project's transcript mirror only when the source belongs to that repository.
- Use `scripts/discover-transcripts.py` when the skill needs to scan local client stores instead of importing one explicit source path.
- During discovery, mirror only transcripts that match the current repository into `Memory/06_transcripts/**`; import unrelated projects into the global archive only.
- Skip snapshot-only or otherwise content-empty transcript files instead of generating empty clean transcripts.
- Keep cleaned transcript indexes in `Memory/06_transcripts/clean/<client>/` and the matching global clean archive synchronized.
- Raw transcript upload approval only controls Git staging and push for `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**`. It does not block project-local storage.
- When a cleaned transcript result affects an important decision, verify the exact wording against the raw transcript before treating it as evidence.

assistant #120 commentary 01:47:16

我再补两块关键事实：这台机器上有没有真正注册心跳任务，以及仓库里目前能检到的“最近一次历史会话”到底是哪条。这样我们就能把“理论上能不能”和“现在实际上发生了什么”分开说清楚。

38`t## My request for Codex:

41`t### 2. assistant
42`t- Timestamp: `2026-03-20T07:27:08Z`

44`t我先看一下当前仓库的分支、远端和 PR 工具可用性，确认现在是不是还有未合并的 PR；如果都已经合并，我再帮你切回 `dev`。
45`t
46`t### 3. assistant
47`t- Timestamp: `2026-03-20T07:27:25Z`
48`t
49`t我已经确认仓库在 GitHub 上，当前分支是 `feature/platform-upgrade-plan-docs`。接下来我会先读一下项目记忆里的当前目标，再去查 GitHub 上还有没有未合并的 PR，同时确认切回 `dev` 会不会被当前未提交改动挡住。
50`t
51`t### 4. assistant
52`t- Timestamp: `2026-03-20T07:27:46Z`
53`t
54`tGitHub 这边已经查到了一个关键信息：当前分支对应的 PR `#23` 已经是 `Merged`，而且仓库现在没有任何 `open` 状态的 PR。现在我再确认一下本地 `dev` 分支是否存在，以及当前这些未提交改动会不会影响切换。
55`t
56`t### 5. assistant
57`t- Timestamp: `2026-03-20T07:27:59Z`
58`t
59`t我已经确认本地和远端都有 `dev` 分支。当前工作区还有未提交内容：`AGENTS.md` 已修改，`Memory/` 下有 3 个未跟踪文件；我会先直接尝试无破坏地切到 `dev`，如果 Git 判断会冲突，它会拦住，我们不会丢改动。
60`t
61`t### 6. assistant
62`t- Timestamp: `2026-03-20T07:28:19Z`
63`t
64`t分支已经安全切回 `dev` 了，当前本地改动也都还在。我再补查一下有没有“已关闭但未合并”的 PR，这样就能更准确回答“是不是都合并了”。
65`t
66`t### 7. assistant
67`t- Timestamp: `2026-03-20T07:28:48Z`

72`t- 现在没有任何 `open` 的 PR。
73`t- 也没有“已关闭但未合并”的 PR。
74`t
75`t我已经帮你切回 `dev` 了，而且本地改动都还在。当前是 `dev`，并且和 `origin/dev` 对齐；工作区里还保留着 [AGENTS.md](d:/demo1/papaweb/AGENTS.md) 的修改，以及 `Memory/` 下的未跟踪文件。

29`t## Messages
30`t### 1. user
31`t- Timestamp: `2026-03-20T10:06:16Z`
32`t
33`tSearch the web for detailed technical information about Camoufox (https://github.com/daijro/camoufox) to do a comprehensive comparison with a Go-based chromedp browser automation approach.
34`t
35`tI need to understand:
36`t
37`t1. **Camoufox Architecture**:
38`t   - How does it modify Firefox at the C++ level?
39`t   - What fingerprint parameters does it control?
40`t   - How does it handle WebGL, Canvas, AudioContext fingerprinting?
41`t   - Does it support headless mode that passes bot detection?
42`t   - How does it integrate with Playwright?
43`t   - What's the memory/CPU footprint per browser instance?
44`t   - Does it support concurrent browser contexts?
45`t   - Can it run in Docker/Linux headless environments?
46`t
47`t2. **Anti-detection depth**:
48`t   - How does it compare to Playwright stealth plugins?
49`t   - How does it compare to puppeteer-extra-plugin-stealth?
50`t   - Can it pass creepjs, pixelscan, browserleaks tests?
51`t   - How does it handle navigator.webdriver detection?
52`t   - Does it handle CDP detection (Runtime.enable leak)?
53`t
54`t3. **Performance**:
55`t   - Startup time per browser instance
56`t   - Memory usage per context
57`t   - Can it handle 10+ concurrent sessions?
58`t   - Is there a connection pool / browser pool mechanism?
59`t
60`t4. **Limitations**:
61`t   - Firefox-only (no Chrome) - what are the implications?
62`t   - Does it support all Playwright APIs?
63`t   - Any known detection vectors that still work against it?
64`t   - Community size and maintenance activity
65`t
66`t5. **Integration patterns**:
67`t   - Can it be called from Node.js/Go via HTTP API?
68`t   - Is there a REST API or only Python SDK?
69`t   - How would you integrate it into a microservice architecture?
70`t
71`tSearch for blog posts, technical reviews, and comparisons. Also search for "camoufox vs puppeteer stealth", "camoufox detection", "camoufox review 2025".
72`t
73`t### 2. assistant
74`t- Timestamp: `2026-03-20T10:06:51Z`

76`tI'll search for comprehensive technical information about Camoufox from multiple angles.

可以，而且这台机器上的 Heartbeat 其实已经在跑。前一条里我没有把“活跃记忆文件”和“transcript 归档”这两层区分开，是我解释得不够清楚。 **原因** - 之所以你看到 `Memory/01_goals`、`Memory/02_todos`、`Memory/03_chat_logs` 还停在 2026-03-20，是因为 Heartbeat 的职责是“扫描 -> 导入 transcript -> 清洗 -> 提...

Expand full message

可以，而且这台机器上的 Heartbeat 其实已经在跑。前一条里我没有把“活跃记忆文件”和“transcript 归档”这两层区分开，是我解释得不够清楚。

原因
- 之所以你看到 Memory/01_goals、Memory/02_todos、Memory/03_chat_logs 还停在 2026-03-20，是因为 Heartbeat 的职责是“扫描 -> 导入 transcript -> 清洗 -> 提交/推送”，不是自动把最新对话回写成 active goal/todo/chat log。这一点在 [heartbeat-scheduling.md](C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/references/heartbeat-scheduling.md) 和 [update-rules.md](C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/references/update-rules.md) 里写得很明确。
- 所以“停在 20 号”不等于没同步到后续对话，只是这些后续对话主要进了 Memory/06_transcripts/**，还没有被人工提升进 active memory。
- 我之前跑 memorytree daemon status 失败，是因为 memorytree 这个 CLI 包装器不在当前 shell 的 PATH 里，不代表心跳没注册。

现在状态
- Windows 任务计划里已经有 MemoryTree Heartbeat，下一次运行时间是 2026-03-21 09:51，北京时间。
- [config.toml](C:/Users/ai/.memorytree/config.toml) 里 papaweb 的 last_heartbeat_at 是 2026-03-21T01:41:00.908Z，换成北京时间就是 2026-03-21 09:41:00。
- 这个仓库已经同步了 Claude Code 和 Codex 的 transcript，到 [Memory/06_transcripts/clean](D:/demo1/papaweb/Memory/06_transcripts/clean) 和 [Memory/07_reports/transcripts](D:/demo1/papaweb/Memory/07_reports/transcripts)。
- 反过来，真正还停在 2026-03-20 的，是初始化当天生成的 active 文件：[goal_v001_20260320.md](D:/demo1/papaweb/Memory/01_goals/goal_v001_20260320.md)、[todo_v001_001_20260320.md](D:/demo1/papaweb/Memory/02_todos/todo_v001_001_20260320.md)、[2026-03-20_15-14.md](D:/demo1/papaweb/Memory/03_chat_logs/2026-03-20_15-14.md)。

我刚查到的最近会话
- 当前这次会话本身已经被导入了，最新一条 Codex transcript 是 [当前 Codex 会话](D:/demo1/papaweb/Memory/06_transcripts/clean/codex/2026/03/019d0e0c-20c9-7fc3-b8f7-22ef7d7ece96__6eb1c15d.md)，开始时间是 2026-03-21 09:39:29，北京时间。
- 按“排除当前会话”的规则，最近一条历史会话是 Claude Code 的一条子代理 transcript，[Claude 最近历史会话](D:/demo1/papaweb/Memory/06_transcripts/clean/claude/2026/03/7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__d43450e9.md)，开始时间是 2026-03-20 18:06:16，北京时间，主题是调研 Camoufox 和 chromedp 的技术对比。
- 如果只看这条项目主线，最有价值的上一轮历史摘要仍然是 Claude 那次关于“统一风控对抗平台”的总结，[Claude 主线摘要](D:/demo1/papaweb/Memory/06_transcripts/clean/claude/2026/03/7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md#L397)。它明确记了：统一风控对抗平台架构方案.md 已完成两轮 review，补了 13 个修正点，结论是 Pinchtab 做唯一浏览器引擎，MediaCrawler 退为平台知识库。
- 最近一条非当前的 Codex 主会话是 [Codex 上一条主会话](D:/demo1/papaweb/Memory/06_transcripts/clean/codex/2026/03/019d0a22-2d3e-76c0-89ed-35ea66a55a58__9a60f3eb.md)，开始时间是 2026-03-20 15:25:05，北京时间，内容是查 PR 是否都已合并，并安全切回 dev。

如果你要，我下一步就直接把这些“最近跨客户端历史”正式补进 active Memory，至少更新 03_chat_logs，并把项目主线沉淀到 04_knowledge/02_todos，这样下次就不会再看起来停在 20 号。

Show task summary

可以，而且这台机器上的 Heartbeat 其实已经在跑。前一条里我没有把“活跃记忆文件”和“transcript 归档”这两层区分开，是我解释得不够清楚。

原因
- 之所以你看到 Memory/01_goals、Memory/02_todos、Memory/03_chat_logs 还停在 2026-03-20，是因为 Heartbeat 的职责是“扫描 -> 导入 transcript -> 清洗 -> 提交/推送”，不是自动把最新对话回写成 active goal/todo/chat log。这一点在 [heartbeat-scheduling.md](C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/references/heartbeat-scheduling.md) 和 [update-rules.md](C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/references/update-rules.md) 里写得很明确。
- 所以“停在 20 号”不等于没同步到后续对话，只是这些后续对话主要进了 Memory/06_transcripts/**，还没有被人工提升进 active memory。
- 我之前跑 memorytree daemon status 失败，是因为 memorytree 这个 CLI 包装器不在当前 shell 的 PATH 里，不代表心跳没注册。

现在状态
- Windows 任务计划里已经有 MemoryTree Heartbeat，下一次运行时间是 2026-03-21 09:51，北京时间。
- [config.toml](C:/Users/ai/.memorytree/config.toml) 里 papaweb 的 last_heartbeat_at 是 2026-03-21T01:41:00.908Z，换成北京时间就是 2026-03-21 09:41:00。
- 这个仓库已经同步了 Claude Code 和 Codex 的 transcript，到 [Memory/06_transcripts/clean](D:/demo1/papaweb/Memory/06_transcripts/clean) 和 [Memory/07_reports/transcripts](D:/demo1/papaweb/Memory/07_reports/transcripts)。
- 反过来，真正还停在 2026-03-20 的，是初始化当天生成的 active 文件：[goal_v001_20260320.md](D:/demo1/papaweb/Memory/01_goals/goal_v001_20260320.md)、[todo_v001_001_20260320.md](D:/demo1/papaweb/Memory/02_todos/todo_v001_001_20260320.md)、[2026-03-20_15-14.md](D:/demo1/papaweb/Memory/03_chat_logs/2026-03-20_15-14.md)。

我刚查到的最近会话
- 当前这次会话本身已经被导入了，最新一条 Codex transcript 是 [当前 Codex 会话](D:/demo1/papaweb/Memory/06_transcripts/clean/codex/2026/03/019d0e0c-20c9-7fc3-b8f7-22ef7d7ece96__6eb1c15d.md)，开始时间是 2026-03-21 09:39:29，北京时间。
- 按“排除当前会话”的规则，最近一条历史会话是 Claude Code 的一条子代理 transcript，[Claude 最近历史会话](D:/demo1/papaweb/Memory/06_transcripts/clean/claude/2026/03/7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__d43450e9.md)，开始时间是 2026-03-20 18:06:16，北京时间，主题是调研 Camoufox 和 chromedp 的技术对比。
- 如果只看这条项目主线，最有价值的上一轮历史摘要仍然是 Claude 那次关于“统一风控对抗平台”的总结，[Claude 主线摘要](D:/demo1/papaweb/Memory/06_transcripts/clean/claude/2026/03/7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6__7081f2dd.md#L397)。它明确记了：统一风控对抗平台架构方案.md 已完成两轮 review，补了 13 个修正点，结论是 Pinchtab 做唯一浏览器引擎，MediaCrawler 退为平台知识库。
- 最近一条非当前的 Codex 主会话是 [Codex 上一条主会话](D:/demo1/papaweb/Memory/06_transcripts/clean/codex/2026/03/019d0a22-2d3e-76c0-89ed-35ea66a55a58__9a60f3eb.md)，开始时间是 2026-03-20 15:25:05，北京时间，内容是查 PR 是否都已合并，并安全切回 dev。

如果你要，我下一步就直接把这些“最近跨客户端历史”正式补进 active Memory，至少更新 03_chat_logs，并把项目主线沉淀到 04_knowledge/02_todos，这样下次就不会再看起来停在 20 号。

      "developer_instructions": "# Collaboration Mode: Default\r\n\r\nYou are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.\r\n\r\nYour active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.\r\n\r\n## request_user_input availability\r\n\r\nThe `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.\r\n\r\nIn Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.\r\n"
    }
  },
  "realtime_active": false,
  "effort": "xhigh",
  "summary": "none",
  "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md\n\n## 1) 目标\n本文件定义 `papaweb` 团队开发协作规则，适用于本地团队与所有自动化代理。\n\n## 2) 分支模型\n- `main`：生产/发布分支，只接收经过验证的发布变更。\n- `dev`：日常集成分支，所有功能先合入此分支。\n- `feature/*`：新功能分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。\n- `fix/*`：缺陷修复分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。\n- `release/*`：发布准备分支，从 `dev` 切出；验证通过后 PR 合入 `main`，随后回合 `dev`。\n- `hotfix/*`：线上紧急修复分支，从 `main` 切出，先合入 `main`，再回合 `dev`。\n\n## 3) 推送与 PR 规则（强约束）\n- 禁止直接 push 到 `main`。\n- 禁止直接 push 到 `dev`。\n- 所有日常开发变更必须通过 PR 合入 `dev`。\n- `main` 只允许来自 `release/*` 或 `hotfix/*` 的 PR。\n- 每个 PR 至少 1 名 reviewer 审核通过后才能合并。\n\n## 4) CI / E2E 准入规则\n- PR 合并到 `dev` 前，必须满足：\n- `ci` 检查通过（单元测试、静态检查）。\n- `e2e` 检查通过（端到端关键路径）。\n- 任一检查失败，禁止合并。\n- 禁止以“先合并后补测”为理由绕过。\n\n## 5) TDD（测试驱动开发）规则\n- 必须执行 `Red -> Green -> Refactor` 三步：\n- `Red`：先写测试并确认失败。\n- `Green`：写最小实现让测试通过。\n- `Refactor`：重构代码并保持测试持续通过。\n- 修复 bug 时，必须先补回归测试，再改业务代码。\n- 新增功能 PR，至少包含：\n- 1 个单元测试。\n- 1 个集成测试或 E2E 用例（覆盖主流程）。\n- 禁止删除/跳过测试来“凑绿灯”。\n\n## 6) PR 必填信息\n- 变更目的与范围。\n- 验收标准（可观察结果）。\n- 测试证据（执行命令与结果）。\n- 风险点与回滚方案。\n- 若影响使用方式，需同步更新文档。\n\n## 7) 合并策略\n- 默认使用 `Squash merge`，保持历史清晰。\n- Commit message 建议使用 Conventional Commits（如 `feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`）。\n\n## 8) 本地防护建议（必配）\n- 所有人本地安装 `pre-push` hook，拦截推送到 `main`/`dev`。\n- 推荐规则：若目标分支是 `main` 或 `dev`，直接拒绝并提示走 PR。\n\n## 9) 紧急例外流程\n- 仅 `hotfix/*` 可走紧急流程。\n- 需在 PR 描述中写明原因、风险、回滚步骤。\n- 紧急修复合入 `main` 后，必须在 24 小时内回合到 `dev` 并补齐测试。\n\n---\n\n## 10) MemoryTree 项目记忆\n\n本仓库使用 MemoryTree 管理项目级记忆，结构位于 `Memory/` 目录。\n\n### 读取顺序\n1. 本文件 `AGENTS.md`\n2. `Memory/01_goals/` 中最新的目标文件\n3. `Memory/02_todos/` 中绑定该目标的最新待办\n4. `Memory/04_knowledge/` 仅在需要时读取\n5. `Memory/03_chat_logs/` 和 `Memory/05_archive/` 仅在需要时读取\n\n### 活跃文件规则\n- `01_goals/`：目标变更需用户确认后才创建新版本，日常进展不触发新版本。\n- `02_todos/`：进度变化、里程碑推进、下一步任务变更时更新当前待办。\n- `03_chat_logs/`：仅追加，不修改或删除已有记录。\n\n## 11) MemoryTree 提交与 PR 流程\n\nMemoryTree 变更使用独立的提交和 PR 流程，不与产品代码混合。\n\n### 提交规则\n- 仅暂存 MemoryTree 管辖文件：`Memory/**` 和 `AGENTS.md`（经用户确认时）。\n- Commit 标题使用 `docs(memorytree): <描述>`，兼容本仓库 Conventional Commits 规范。\n- 禁止在同一提交中混入产品代码。\n\n### 分支与 PR\n- 使用专用分支：`memorytree/<scope>-<yyyymmdd>-<slug>`。\n- PR 目标分支遵循仓库规则（日常合入 `dev`）。\n- 仅在仓库仍执行必要审核和 CI 检查时，才可启用 auto-merge。\n\n## 12) MemoryTree 安全规则\n\n- 不得绕过本仓库的分支保护、PR 审核或 CI 准入规则。\n- 不得直接推送到 `main` 或 `dev`。\n- 若 diff 包含 MemoryTree 管辖范围外的文件，必须停下并询问用户。\n- 原始转录文件（`Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**`）在用户明确批准前不自动暂存或推送。\n",
  "truncation_policy": {
    "mode": "tokens",
    "limit": 10000
  }
}

List all its features, architecture, anti-detection capabilities, proxy support, distributed scraping, and how it compares to other Go scraping frameworks.","url":"https://github.com/gocolly/colly"},"name":"WebFetch","type":"tool_use"}],"id":"msg_36be8df9-b79c-4c69-908c-8c14a78c4547","model":"claude-opus-4-6","role":"assistant","type":"message","usage":{"cache_creation_input_tokens":1822,"cache_read_input_tokens":17182,"input_tokens":4750,"output_tokens":0},"context_management":null},"uuid":"6250364c-cf0d-43a1-ac19-a6b189bb0d95"},"type":"agent_progress","prompt":"","agentId":"a7d27d581445f04a7"},"toolUseID":"agent_msg_70812c7a-67b9-4154-80ba-d82590d34b98","parentToolUseID":"tooluse_ljFkdF2X4HdhFUoyTFhTau","uuid":"cac4cb4e-12d8-4d13-aa7e-c2cb4be52cd8","timestamp":"2026-03-20T08:52:57.843Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"claude-vscode","cwd":"d:\\demo1\\papaweb","sessionId":"7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6","version":"2.1.79","gitBranch":"dev","slug":"jazzy-frolicking-hummingbird"}
{"parentUuid":"cac4cb4e-12d8-4d13-aa7e-c2cb4be52cd8","isSidechain":false,"type":"progress","data":{"message":{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"tooluse_DbgEEIhztaXITT3uowmZT7","type":"tool_result","content":"# Camoufox: Anti-Detect Browser Overview\n\nI'm Claude Haiku 4.5, and I'll break down what Camoufox is based on the GitHub repository content.\n\n## What is Camoufox?\n\nCamoufox is \"a stealthy, minimalistic, custom build of Firefox for web scraping.\" It's an open-source anti-detect browser designed to evade bot detection systems through fingerprint injection and rotation at the browser engine level rather than through JavaScript manipulation.\n\n## Core Anti-Detection Features\n\n**Stealth Architecture:**\n- Hides automation library by sandboxing Playwright's Page Agent code in an isolated scope\n- Intercepts calls at the C++ implementation level, making changes appear native\n- Patches Firefox's headless mode to appear identical to normal window mode\n- Removes traces of automation that websites typically detect\n\n**Fingerprint Spoofing Capabilities:**\n- Navigator properties (device, browser, OS, locale)\n- Screen dimensions, resolution, and viewport properties\n- WebGL parameters, extensions, and shader formats\n- WebRTC IP spoofing at protocol level\n- Geolocation, timezone, and locale spoofing\n- AudioContext sample rates and device voices\n- Battery API and hardware sensor data\n\n**Behavioral Mimicry:**\n- Human-like mouse movement using distance-aware trajectory algorithms\n- Consistent fingerprint generation using BrowserForge's statistical distribution\n- Automatic font selection matching target OS\n- Font metrics randomization to prevent fingerprinting\n\n## Key Differences from Standard Firefox\n\nCamoufox strips Mozilla services, telemetry, and bloat鈥攗sing approximately 200MB memory versus standard Firefox. It includes debloat patches from LibreWolf and Ghostery, removes CSS animations, and bundles system fonts for Windows, macOS, and Linux.\n\n## Scraping Framework Integration\n\nCamoufox provides Python APIs compatible with Playwright:\n\n**Sync API:**\n```python\nfrom camoufox.sync_api import Camoufox\nwith Camoufox() as browser:\n    page = browser.new_page()\n```\n\n**Async API:**\n```python\nfrom camoufox.async_api import AsyncCamoufox\nasync with AsyncCamoufox() as browser:\n    page = await browser.new_page()\n```\n\nConfiguration accepts JSON for custom fingerprint injection, with unspecified properties auto-populated using realistic distributions.\n\n## Important Limitations\n\nThe project notes it \"does not fully support injecting Chromium fingerprints\" due to engine-specific behavior tests. Additionally, fingerprint inconsistencies still require ongoing maintenance as anti-bot systems continuously discover new detection vectors."}]},"uuid":"e240556c-3af2-451f-bab5-08ee5085d052","timestamp":"2026-03-20T08:53:18.052Z"},"type":"agent_progress","prompt":"","agentId":"a7d27d581445f04a7"},"toolUseID":"agent_msg_70812c7a-67b9-4154-80ba-d82590d34b98","parentToolUseID":"tooluse_ljFkdF2X4HdhFUoyTFhTau","uuid":"025432f0-2391-46f4-89a3-b261dc0a8591","timestamp":"2026-03-20T08:53:18.055Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"claude-vscode","cwd":"d:\\demo1\\papaweb","sessionId":"7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6","version":"2.1.79","gitBranch":"dev","slug":"jazzy-frolicking-hummingbird"}
{"parentUuid":"025432f0-2391-46f4-89a3-b261dc0a8591","isSidechain":false,"type":"progress","data":{"message":{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"tooluse_F4Tf9FjgBeR0H9boATfYOa","type":"tool_result","content":"I'm Claude Haiku 4.5, an AI assistant built to help developers. Based on the GitHub repository content you've shared, here's what I can tell you about Crawlee:\n\n**What is Crawlee**\n\nCrawlee is a Node.js library for web scraping and browser automation. It's designed to help developers \"build reliable scrapers. Fast\" by providing a unified interface for both HTTP and headless browser crawling.\n\n**Core Features**\n\nThe library offers several key capabilities:\n- Single interface for HTTP and browser-based crawling\n- Persistent URL queue supporting breadth-first and depth-first traversal\n- Pluggable storage for data and files\n- Automatic resource scaling\n- Integrated proxy rotation and session management\n- Customizable lifecycle hooks\n- CLI for project bootstrapping\n- TypeScript support with generics\n\n**Supported Crawlers**\n\nCrawlee supports multiple crawler types:\n- PlaywrightCrawler (browser automation via Playwright)\n- PuppeteerCrawler (browser automation via Puppeteer)\n- CheerioCrawler (fast HTML parsing)\n- JSDOM support\n- Raw HTTP crawling\n\n**Anti-Detection & Proxy Management**\n\nThe library includes:\n- \"Zero config HTTP2 support, even for proxies\"\n- Automatic browser-like header generation\n- Browser TLS fingerprint replication\n- Human-like fingerprint generation\n- Session management capabilities\n\n**Recent Status**\n\nThe latest release is v3.16.0 (February 6, 2026), with 133 total releases. The project has 22.4k GitHub stars and active maintenance with 124 contributors."}]},"uuid":"2868f62b-efce-4874-b65e-d081c405b704","timestamp":"2026-03-20T08:53:24.399Z"},"type":"agent_progress","prompt":"","agentId":"a7d27d581445f04a7"},"toolUseID":"agent_msg_70812c7a-67b9-4154-80ba-d82590d34b98","parentToolUseID":"tooluse_ljFkdF2X4HdhFUoyTFhTau","uuid":"0eeef9ef-0d43-4dea-8304-b053563c0108","timestamp":"2026-03-20T08:53:24.400Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"claude-vscode","cwd":"d:\\demo1\\papaweb","sessionId":"7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6","version":"2.1.79","gitBranch":"dev","slug":"jazzy-frolicking-hummingbird"}
{"parentUuid":"0eeef9ef-0d43-4dea-8304-b053563c0108","isSidechain":false,"type":"progress","data":{"message":{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"tooluse_y9E4UQyF5tPZeuN1sS0sdf","type":"tool_result","content":"I'm Claude Haiku 4.5, and I'm happy to break down what SpiderFlow is based on the GitHub repository content.\n\n**What is SpiderFlow?**\n\nSpiderFlow is a next-generation web scraping platform that uses a graphical, flow-based approach rather than requiring code. The platform describes itself as \"a highly flexible and configurable crawler platform\" that lets users define scraping workflows visually.\n\n**Key Features:**\n\nThe platform supports multiple data extraction methods including \"Xpath/JsonPath/css selectors/regex extraction/mixed extraction\" and handles various formats like JSON, XML, and binary data. It includes database integration with SQL operations, automatic data persistence to databases or files, and built-in functions for string manipulation, date handling, and encryption.\n\n**Visual Workflow Capabilities:**\n\nSpiderFlow's core strength is its graphical interface鈥攗sers design scraping flows as diagrams without writing code. The repository shows screenshots of a visual editor, testing interface, and debugging tools.\n\n**Distributed/Advanced Scraping:**\n\nThe platform supports JavaScript-rendered pages, proxy configuration, and automatic cookie management. It also offers plugin extensibility for custom executors and methods.\n\n**Anti-Detection Features:**\n\nThe documentation doesn't explicitly mention anti-detection capabilities. However, proxy support and cookie management could assist with avoiding detection.\n\n**Important Note:** The repository includes a disclaimer warning against using SpiderFlow for illegal purposes or violating terms of service."}]},"uuid":"4fa566c0-297d-4d9d-88c7-229e1ad59467","timestamp":"2026-03-20T08:53:35.901Z"},"type":"agent_progress","prompt":"","agentId":"a7d27d581445f04a7"},"toolUseID":"agent_msg_70812c7a-67b9-4154-80ba-d82590d34b98","parentToolUseID":"tooluse_ljFkdF2X4HdhFUoyTFhTau","uuid":"16dda9c6-f1f9-4249-8aa9-5f8891ad843f","timestamp":"2026-03-20T08:53:35.902Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"claude-vscode","cwd":"d:\\demo1\\papaweb","sessionId":"7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6","version":"2.1.79","gitBranch":"dev","slug":"jazzy-frolicking-hummingbird"}
{"parentUuid":"16dda9c6-f1f9-4249-8aa9-5f8891ad843f","isSidechain":false,"type":"progress","data":{"message":{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"tooluse_IUurCfzFHHCg1lf3ZsI9pk","type":"tool_result","content":"I'm Claude Haiku 4.5, and I'm happy to break down what Colly is based on the GitHub repository content you've shared.\n\n## What is Colly?\n\nColly is a Go web scraping and crawling framework described as \"Lightning Fast and Elegant Scraping Framework for Gophers.\" It provides developers with a clean interface for building scrapers, crawlers, and spiders in Go.\n\n## Core Features\n\nAccording to the repository, Colly includes:\n\n- Clean API design\n- High performance (\">1k request/sec on a single core\")\n- Request delay management and concurrency control per domain\n- Automatic cookie and session handling\n- Sync, async, and parallel scraping capabilities\n- Built-in caching\n- Automatic encoding for non-unicode responses\n- Robots.txt support\n- Distributed scraping functionality\n- Environment variable configuration\n- Extension support\n\n## Architecture & Capabilities\n\nThe framework operates through a collector-based model where you define callbacks for different events (OnRequest, OnHTML, OnError, etc.). It handles the HTTP backend, response parsing, and request queuing internally.\n\n## What's Not Covered\n\nThe provided content doesn't detail anti-detection capabilities, proxy support specifics, or comparative analysis with other Go frameworks. The README focuses on features and basic usage rather than technical architecture or competitive positioning.\n\nIf you need deeper technical details on those aspects, I'd recommend checking the actual codebase files or the project's documentation site."}]},"uuid":"34b468dc-5234-4a10-9b00-5600aeea6791","timestamp":"2026-03-20T08:53:37.068Z"},"type":"agent_progress","prompt":"","agentId":"a7d27d581445f04a7"},"toolUseID":"agent_msg_70812c7a-67b9-4154-80ba-d82590d34b98","parentToolUseID":"tooluse_ljFkdF2X4HdhFUoyTFhTau","uuid":"ed482d81-7df3-4e85-a3db-de28b1aa979e","timestamp":"2026-03-20T08:53:37.069Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"claude-vscode","cwd":"d:\\demo1\\papaweb","sessionId":"7a813b51-78e9-46a8-983d-08411cbb2fa6","version":"2.1.79","gitBranch":"dev","slug":"jazzy-frolicking-hummingbird"}
