import { TASK_STATUS } from "@papaweb/contracts";
import {
  collectRunSourceIds,
  createId,
  createPgPool,
  createRedisClient,
  enqueueDiscoveryBatch,
  enqueueSeedBatch,
  ensurePlatformSchema,
  getPlatformConfig,
  loadSeedPlan,
  log,
  preparePipelineRun,
  resetPipelineSources,
} from "@papaweb/shared";
import {
  TASK_EXPORT_COLUMNS,
  TOOL_EXPORT_COLUMNS,
  buildCsvFilename,
  buildTasksExportQuery,
  buildToolsExportQuery,
  sendCsv,
} from "./csv-export.mjs";
import { loadPipelineMetrics } from "./metrics.mjs";

const serviceName = "query-api";
const defaultConfig = getPlatformConfig();
const VALID_TASK_STATUSES = new Set(Object.values(TASK_STATUS));

export function createApp(options = {}) {
  const config = options.config ?? defaultConfig;
  const pg = options.pg ?? createPgPool(config.db);
  const redis = options.redis ?? createRedisClient(config.redis);
  const logImpl = options.logImpl ?? log;
  const loadSeedPlanImpl = options.loadSeedPlanImpl ?? loadSeedPlan;
  const collectRunSourceIdsImpl = options.collectRunSourceIdsImpl ?? collectRunSourceIds;
  const preparePipelineRunImpl = options.preparePipelineRunImpl ?? preparePipelineRun;
  const resetPipelineSourcesImpl = options.resetPipelineSourcesImpl ?? resetPipelineSources;
  const enqueueDiscoveryBatchImpl = options.enqueueDiscoveryBatchImpl ?? enqueueDiscoveryBatch;
  const enqueueSeedBatchImpl = options.enqueueSeedBatchImpl ?? enqueueSeedBatch;
  const loadPipelineMetricsImpl = options.loadPipelineMetricsImpl ?? loadPipelineMetrics;

  const app = express();
  app.use(express.json({ limit: "256kb" }));

  app.get(
    "/healthz",
    asyncHandler(async (_req, res) => {
      await pg.query("SELECT 1");
      res.status(200).json({ status: "ok", service: serviceName });
    })
  );

  app.get(
    "/api/v1/tools",
    asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
      const filters = parseToolsListRequest(req.query);
      const query = buildToolsListQuery(filters);
      const rows = await pg.query(query.text, query.values);
      res.json(buildListResponse(rows.rows, filters));
    })
  );

  app.get(
    "/api/v1/tasks",
    asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
      const filters = parseTasksListRequest(req.query);
      const query = buildTasksListQuery(filters);
      const rows = await pg.query(query.text, query.values);
      res.json(buildListResponse(rows.rows, filters));
    })
  );

  app.get(
    "/api/v1/metrics",
    asyncHandler(async (_req, res) => {
      const metrics = await loadPipelineMetricsImpl(pg, redis, config);
      res.json(metrics);
    })
  );

  app.get(
    "/api/v1/source-sites",
    asyncHandler(async (_req, res) => {
      const rows = await pg.query(
        `SELECT id, name, base_url, enabled, meta, updated_at
         FROM source_sites
         ORDER BY id ASC`
      );
      res.json({ items: rows.rows, count: rows.rowCount });
    })
  );

  app.get(
    "/api/v1/exports/tools.csv",
    asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
      const filters = parseToolsExportRequest(req.query);
      const query = buildToolsExportQuery(filters);
      const rows = await pg.query(query.text, query.values);
      sendCsv(
        res,
        buildCsvFilename("tools", {
          sourceId: filters.sourceId,
          runId: filters.runId,
          jobId: filters.jobId,
        }),
        TOOL_EXPORT_COLUMNS,
        rows.rows
      );
    })
  );

  app.get(
    "/api/v1/exports/tasks.csv",
    asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
      const filters = parseTasksExportRequest(req.query);
      const query = buildTasksExportQuery(filters);
      const rows = await pg.query(query.text, query.values);
      sendCsv(
        res,
        buildCsvFilename("tasks", {
          sourceId: filters.sourceId,
          runId: filters.runId,
          jobId: filters.jobId,
          status: filters.status,
        }),
        TASK_EXPORT_COLUMNS,
        rows.rows
      );
    })
  );

  app.post(
    "/api/v1/pipeline/seed-run",
    asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
      const body = parseSeedRunRequest(req.body, config);
      const seedPlan = await loadSeedPlanImpl({
        seedUrls: body.seedUrls.length > 0 ? body.seedUrls : config.seedUrls,
        sourceId: body.sourceId,
        sourceIds: body.sourceIds.length > 0 ? body.sourceIds : config.sourceIds,
        sourceSitesConfigPath: config.sourceSitesConfigPath,
      });

      const runSourceIds = collectRunSourceIdsImpl(seedPlan, [body.sourceId]);
      let reset = null;
      if (body.coldStart) {
        await preparePipelineRunImpl(pg, {
          sourceIds: runSourceIds,
          runId: body.runId,
          requestedBy: body.requestedBy,
          reason: body.reason,
          meta: {
            coldStart: true,
            runLabel: body.runLabel || null,
          },
        });
        reset = await resetPipelineSourcesImpl(pg, redis, {
          sourceIds: runSourceIds,
          queues: config.queues,
        });
      }

      const result =
        seedPlan.sourceSites && seedPlan.sourceSites.length > 0
          ? await enqueueDiscoveryBatchImpl(pg, redis, seedPlan, {
              queues: config.queues,
              workerName: serviceName,
              requestedBy: body.requestedBy,
              reason: body.reason,
              runId: body.runId,
              runLabel: body.runLabel,
              coldStart: body.coldStart,
              candidateLimitPerSource: body.candidateLimitPerSource ?? 0,
              discoveryPageLimit: body.discoveryPageLimit ?? 0,
            })
          : await enqueueSeedBatchImpl(pg, redis, seedPlan, {
              queues: config.queues,
              workerName: serviceName,
              requestedBy: body.requestedBy,
              reason: body.reason,
              runId: body.runId,
              runLabel: body.runLabel,
              coldStart: body.coldStart,
            });

      res.status(202).json({
        accepted: true,
        ...result,
        runId: body.runId,
        runLabel: body.runLabel || null,
        coldStart: body.coldStart,
        reset,
        requestedBy: body.requestedBy,
        reason: body.reason,
        candidateLimitPerSource: body.candidateLimitPerSource,
        discoveryPageLimit: body.discoveryPageLimit,
      });
    })
  );

  app.use((error, _req, _res, next) => {
    if (error instanceof SyntaxError && "body" in error) {
      next(new ApiError(400, "invalid_json_body", "Request body must be valid JSON"));
      return;
    }
    next(error);
  });

  app.use((error, req, res, _next) => {
    const normalized = normalizeApiError(error);
    if (normalized.statusCode >= 500) {
      logImpl(serviceName, "error", "query-api request failed", {
        path: req.path,
        method: req.method,
        error: normalized.message,
      });
    }

    const payload = {
      error: {
        code: normalized.code,
        message: normalized.message,
      },
    };
    if (normalized.details) {
      payload.error.details = normalized.details;
    }
    if (req.path === "/api/v1/pipeline/seed-run") {
      payload.accepted = false;
    }

    res.status(normalized.statusCode).json(payload);
  });

  return { app, pg, redis, config, logImpl };
}

export async function main(options = {}) {
  const runtime = createApp(options);
  const { app, pg, redis, config, logImpl } = runtime;
  await ensurePlatformSchema(pg);

  const server = app.listen(config.queryApiPort, () => {
    logImpl(serviceName, "info", "query-api started", { port: config.queryApiPort });
  });

  const shutdown = async () => {
    server.close(async () => {
      await redis.quit();
      await pg.end();
      process.exit(0);
    });
  };

  process.on("SIGINT", shutdown);
  process.on("SIGTERM", shutdown);
}

function isMainModule(meta) {
  const entry = process.argv[1];
  return Boolean(entry) && meta.url === pathToFileURL(entry).href;
}

if (isMainModule(import.meta)) {
  main().catch((error) => {
    log(serviceName, "error", "query-api crashed", {
      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
    });
    process.exit(1);
  });
}

export function buildToolsListQuery(filters) {
  const values = [];
  const conditions = [];

  if (filters.sourceId) {
    values.push(filters.sourceId);
    conditions.push(`g.source_id = $${values.length}`);
  }
  if (filters.runId) {
    values.push(filters.runId);
    conditions.push(`g.run_id = $${values.length}`);
  }
  if (filters.jobId) {
    values.push(filters.jobId);
    conditions.push(
      `EXISTS (
         SELECT 1
         FROM crawl_tasks t
         WHERE t.trace_id = g.trace_id
           AND t.job_id = $${values.length}
       )`
    );
  }

  values.push(filters.limit);
  values.push(filters.offset);
  const where = conditions.length > 0 ? `WHERE ${conditions.join(" AND ")}` : "";

  return {
    text:
      `SELECT
         g.id,
         g.run_id,
         g.canonical_url,
         g.title,
         g.summary,
         g.source_id,
         g.quality_score,
         g.trace_id,
         g.published_at,
         g.updated_at,
         COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_count
       FROM gold_tool_entities g
       ${where}
       ORDER BY g.published_at DESC
       LIMIT $${values.length - 1}
       OFFSET $${values.length}`,
    values,
  };
}

export function buildTasksListQuery(filters) {
  const values = [];
  const conditions = [];

  if (filters.runId) {
    values.push(filters.runId);
    conditions.push(`t.run_id = $${values.length}`);
  }
  if (filters.jobId) {
    values.push(filters.jobId);
    conditions.push(`t.job_id = $${values.length}`);
  }
  if (filters.sourceId) {
    values.push(filters.sourceId);
    conditions.push(`t.source_id = $${values.length}`);
  }
  if (filters.status) {
    values.push(filters.status);
    conditions.push(`t.status = $${values.length}`);
  }

  values.push(filters.limit);
  values.push(filters.offset);
  const where = conditions.length > 0 ? `WHERE ${conditions.join(" AND ")}` : "";

  return {
    text:
      `SELECT
         t.run_id,
         t.id,
         t.job_id,
         t.trace_id,
         t.source_id,
         t.url,
         t.final_url,
         t.fetch_channel,
         t.decoded_charset,
         t.stage,
         t.status,
         t.http_status,
         t.error,
         t.published,
         t.created_at,
         t.updated_at,
         COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_count
       FROM crawl_tasks t
       ${where}
       ORDER BY t.created_at DESC
       LIMIT $${values.length - 1}
       OFFSET $${values.length}`,
    values,
  };
}

function asyncHandler(fn) {
  return (req, res, next) => Promise.resolve(fn(req, res, next)).catch(next);
}

function parseToolsListRequest(query) {
  const pagination = parsePagination(query, { defaultLimit: 20, maxLimit: 200 });
  return {
    ...pagination,
    runId: readOptionalQueryString(query.runId, "runId"),
    sourceId: readOptionalQueryString(query.sourceId, "sourceId"),
    jobId: readOptionalQueryString(query.jobId, "jobId"),
  };
}

function parseTasksListRequest(query) {
  const pagination = parsePagination(query, { defaultLimit: 20, maxLimit: 200 });
  const status = readOptionalQueryString(query.status, "status");
  if (status && !VALID_TASK_STATUSES.has(status)) {
    throw new ApiError(400, "invalid_query_parameter", "Query parameter status is invalid", {
      field: "status",
      allowed: [...VALID_TASK_STATUSES],
    });
  }
  return {
    ...pagination,
    runId: readOptionalQueryString(query.runId, "runId"),
    sourceId: readOptionalQueryString(query.sourceId, "sourceId"),
    jobId: readOptionalQueryString(query.jobId, "jobId"),
    status,
  };
}

function parseToolsExportRequest(query) {
  return {
    limit: parseBoundedInteger(query.limit, "limit", { defaultValue: 1000, min: 1, max: 5000 }),
    runId: readOptionalQueryString(query.runId, "runId"),
    sourceId: readOptionalQueryString(query.sourceId, "sourceId"),
    jobId: readOptionalQueryString(query.jobId, "jobId"),
  };
}

function parseTasksExportRequest(query) {
  const status = readOptionalQueryString(query.status, "status");
  if (status && !VALID_TASK_STATUSES.has(status)) {
    throw new ApiError(400, "invalid_query_parameter", "Query parameter status is invalid", {
      field: "status",
      allowed: [...VALID_TASK_STATUSES],
    });
  }
  return {
    limit: parseBoundedInteger(query.limit, "limit", { defaultValue: 1000, min: 1, max: 5000 }),
    runId: readOptionalQueryString(query.runId, "runId"),
    sourceId: readOptionalQueryString(query.sourceId, "sourceId"),
    jobId: readOptionalQueryString(query.jobId, "jobId"),
    status,
  };
}

function parseSeedRunRequest(body, config) {
  if (!body || typeof body !== "object" || Array.isArray(body)) {
    throw new ApiError(400, "invalid_request_body", "Request body must be a JSON object");
  }

  const seedUrls = readOptionalStringList(body.seedUrls, "seedUrls");
  const sourceIds = readOptionalStringList(body.sourceIds, "sourceIds");
  const requestedBy = readOptionalBodyString(body.requestedBy, "requestedBy") || "query-api";
  const reason = readOptionalBodyString(body.reason, "reason") || "manual_trigger";
  const sourceId = readOptionalBodyString(body.sourceId, "sourceId") || config.sourceId;
  const runId = readOptionalBodyString(body.runId, "runId") || createId("run");
  const runLabel = readOptionalBodyString(body.runLabel, "runLabel");
  const coldStart = parseStrictBoolean(body.coldStart, "coldStart", false);
  const candidateLimitPerSource = parseOptionalBoundedInteger(body.candidateLimitPerSource, "candidateLimitPerSource", {
    min: 1,
    max: 10000,
    errorCode: "invalid_request_body",
  });
  const discoveryPageLimit = parseOptionalBoundedInteger(body.discoveryPageLimit, "discoveryPageLimit", {
    min: 1,
    max: 1000,
    errorCode: "invalid_request_body",
  });

  return {
    seedUrls,
    sourceIds,
    requestedBy,
    reason,
    sourceId,
    runId,
    runLabel,
    coldStart,
    candidateLimitPerSource,
    discoveryPageLimit,
  };
}

function parsePagination(query, { defaultLimit, maxLimit }) {
  const limit = parseBoundedInteger(query.limit, "limit", {
    defaultValue: defaultLimit,
    min: 1,
    max: maxLimit,
  });
  const hasOffset = query.offset !== undefined;
  const hasPage = query.page !== undefined;
  if (hasOffset && hasPage) {
    throw new ApiError(
      400,
      "invalid_query_parameter",
      "Query parameters offset and page cannot be used together",
      { fields: ["offset", "page"] }
    );
  }

  if (hasOffset) {
    const offset = parseBoundedInteger(query.offset, "offset", {
      defaultValue: 0,
      min: 0,
      max: Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER,
    });
    return {
      limit,
      offset,
      page: Math.floor(offset / Math.max(limit, 1)) + 1,
    };
  }

  const page = parseBoundedInteger(query.page, "page", {
    defaultValue: 1,
    min: 1,
    max: Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER,
  });
  return {
    limit,
    offset: (page - 1) * limit,
    page,
  };
}

function buildListResponse(rows, filters) {
  const total = rows.length > 0 ? toNumber(rows[0].total_count) : 0;
  const items = rows.map((row) => {
    const next = { ...row };
    delete next.total_count;
    return next;
  });
  return {
    items,
    count: items.length,
    total,
    limit: filters.limit,
    offset: filters.offset,
    page: filters.page,
  };
}

function readOptionalQueryString(value, fieldName) {
  if (value === undefined) return "";
  return readOptionalString(value, fieldName, "query");
}

function readOptionalBodyString(value, fieldName) {
  if (value === undefined || value === null) return "";
  return readOptionalString(value, fieldName, "body");
}

function readOptionalString(value, fieldName, location) {
  const errorCode = location === "body" ? "invalid_request_body" : "invalid_query_parameter";
  if (Array.isArray(value) || (value && typeof value === "object")) {
    throw new ApiError(400, errorCode, `${capitalize(location)} field ${fieldName} must be a string`, {
      field: fieldName,
    });
  }
  const text = String(value).trim();
  if (!text) {
    throw new ApiError(400, errorCode, `${capitalize(location)} field ${fieldName} must not be empty`, {
      field: fieldName,
    });
  }
  return text;
}

function readOptionalStringList(value, fieldName) {
  if (value === undefined || value === null) return [];

  let items = [];
  if (Array.isArray(value)) {
    items = value.map((item) => {
      if (typeof item !== "string") {
        throw new ApiError(400, "invalid_request_body", `Body field ${fieldName} must contain only strings`, {
          field: fieldName,
        });
      }
      return item.trim();
    });
  } else if (typeof value === "string") {
    items = value.split(",").map((item) => item.trim());
  } else {
    throw new ApiError(400, "invalid_request_body", `Body field ${fieldName} must be a string or string array`, {
      field: fieldName,
    });
  }

  const normalized = items.filter(Boolean);
  if (normalized.length === 0) {
    throw new ApiError(400, "invalid_request_body", `Body field ${fieldName} must include at least one value`, {
      field: fieldName,
    });
  }
  return normalized;
}

function parseStrictBoolean(value, fieldName, defaultValue) {
  if (value === undefined || value === null || value === "") {
    return defaultValue;
  }
  if (typeof value === "boolean") {
    return value;
  }

  const normalized = String(value).trim().toLowerCase();
  if (["1", "true", "yes", "y", "on"].includes(normalized)) return true;
  if (["0", "false", "no", "n", "off"].includes(normalized)) return false;
  throw new ApiError(400, "invalid_request_body", `Body field ${fieldName} must be a boolean`, {
    field: fieldName,
  });
}

function parseOptionalBoundedInteger(value, fieldName, { min, max, errorCode }) {
  if (value === undefined || value === null || value === "") {
    return null;
  }
  return parseBoundedInteger(value, fieldName, { min, max, errorCode });
}

function parseBoundedInteger(value, fieldName, { defaultValue = null, min, max, errorCode = "invalid_query_parameter" }) {
  if (value === undefined || value === null || value === "") {
    if (defaultValue === null) {
      throw new ApiError(400, errorCode, `Field ${fieldName} is required`, {
        field: fieldName,
      });
    }
    return defaultValue;
  }
  if (Array.isArray(value) || (value && typeof value === "object")) {
    throw new ApiError(400, errorCode, `Field ${fieldName} must be an integer`, {
      field: fieldName,
    });
  }
  const numeric = Number(value);
  if (!Number.isInteger(numeric)) {
    throw new ApiError(400, errorCode, `Field ${fieldName} must be an integer`, {
      field: fieldName,
    });
  }
  if (numeric < min || numeric > max) {
    throw new ApiError(400, errorCode, `Field ${fieldName} must be between ${min} and ${max}`, {
      field: fieldName,
      min,
      max,
    });
  }
  return numeric;
}

function normalizeApiError(error) {
  if (error instanceof ApiError) {
    return error;
  }
  return new ApiError(500, "internal_error", error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error));
}

function toNumber(value) {
  const n = Number(value);
  return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : 0;
}

function capitalize(value) {
  const text = String(value || "");
  return text.length > 0 ? `${text[0].toUpperCase()}${text.slice(1)}` : text;
}

class ApiError extends Error {
  constructor(statusCode, code, message, details = null) {
    super(message);
    this.statusCode = statusCode;
    this.code = code;
    this.details = details;
  }
}
Tool Result #375 shell_command call_HP9U6ArEqb3voD1nrI5t2pZx exit 0 04:55:02
shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.6 seconds Output: import process from "node:process"; import { pathToFileURL } from "node:url"; import { TASK_STAGES, TASK_STATUS, requireString } from...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.6 seconds
Output:
import process from "node:process";
import { pathToFileURL } from "node:url";
import { TASK_STAGES, TASK_STATUS, requireString } from "@papaweb/contracts";
import {
  buildSourceFetchOptions,
  createPgPool,
  createRedisClient,
  ensurePlatformSchema,
  fetchTextResource,
  getPlatformConfig,
  isSourceRunActive,
  log,
  popQueue,
  pushQueue,
  recordPipelineEvent,
  sleep,
} from "@papaweb/shared";
import { acquireNextFetchTask } from "./fetch-claim.mjs";
import { recoverStaleFetchTasks } from "./fetch-recovery.mjs";
import { createSourceSiteStore } from "./source-site-store.mjs";

const serviceName = "worker-fetch-http";
const config = getPlatformConfig();
const sourceSiteStore = createSourceSiteStore({
  cacheTtlMs: process.env.PAPAWEB_SOURCE_SITE_CACHE_TTL_MS ?? 0,
});
const sourceNextAllowedAt = new Map();
const sourceInFlight = new Set();
let claimGate = Promise.resolve();
let stopping = false;

process.on("SIGINT", () => {
  stopping = true;
});
process.on("SIGTERM", () => {
  stopping = true;
});

function toPositiveInt(value, fallback) {
  const n = Number(value);
  return Number.isInteger(n) && n > 0 ? n : fallback;
}

function randomBetween(min, max) {
  if (max <= min) return min;
  return min + Math.floor(Math.random() * (max - min + 1));
}

function resolveDelayRange(sourceSite) {
  const meta = sourceSite?.meta && typeof sourceSite.meta === "object" ? sourceSite.meta : {};
  const baseDelay = toPositiveInt(meta.delay_ms, 1500);
  const minDelay = toPositiveInt(meta.delay_min_ms, baseDelay);
  const maxDelay = toPositiveInt(meta.delay_max_ms, Math.max(baseDelay, minDelay));
  return {
    min: Math.max(0, minDelay),
    max: Math.max(minDelay, maxDelay),
  };
}

async function loadSourceSite(pg, sourceId) {
  return sourceSiteStore.load(pg, sourceId);
}

function normalizeHttpStatus(value) {
  const n = Number(value);
  return Number.isInteger(n) && n > 0 ? n : null;
}

async function fetchHtml(url, sourceSite, workerConfig = config) {
  const options = buildSourceFetchOptions(sourceSite, workerConfig);
  const response = await fetchTextResource(url, options);
  return {
    ok: response.ok,
    status: response.status,
    html: response.text.slice(0, 250000),
    finalUrl: response.finalUrl || url,
    fetchChannel: response.fetchChannel || "http",
    decodedCharset: response.decodedCharset || "",
    error: response.error,
    failureCategory: response.failureCategory ?? null,
    attemptCount: Number(response.attemptCount ?? 1),
    fallbackAttempted: Boolean(response.fallbackAttempted),
    fallbackSucceeded: Boolean(response.fallbackSucceeded),
    fallbackTriggerCategory: response.fallbackTriggerCategory ?? null,
    fallbackTriggerStatus: normalizeHttpStatus(response.fallbackTriggerStatus),
    fallbackError: response.fallbackError ?? null,
  };
}

export async function processClaimedTask(pg, redis, claimed, options = {}) {
  const workerConfig = options.config ?? config;
  const isSourceRunActiveImpl = options.isSourceRunActiveImpl ?? isSourceRunActive;
  const loadSourceSiteImpl = options.loadSourceSiteImpl ?? loadSourceSite;
  const fetchHtmlImpl =
    options.fetchHtmlImpl ?? ((url, sourceSite) => fetchHtml(url, sourceSite, workerConfig));
  const pushQueueImpl = options.pushQueueImpl ?? pushQueue;
  const recordPipelineEventImpl = options.recordPipelineEventImpl ?? recordPipelineEvent;
  const logImpl = options.logImpl ?? log;
  const workerServiceName = options.serviceName ?? serviceName;
  const sleepImpl = options.sleepImpl ?? sleep;
  const taskId = requireString(claimed.id, "id");
  const runId = String(claimed.run_id || "").trim();
  const traceId = requireString(claimed.trace_id, "trace_id");
  const jobId = requireString(claimed.job_id, "job_id");
  const sourceId = requireString(claimed.source_id, "source_id");
  const url = requireString(claimed.url, "url");

  if (!(await isSourceRunActiveImpl(pg, sourceId, runId))) {
    logImpl(workerServiceName, "warn", "skip stale fetch task", {
      taskId,
      sourceId,
      jobId,
      runId: runId || null,
    });
    return;
  }

  try {
    const sourceSite = await loadSourceSiteImpl(pg, sourceId);
    const nextAllowedAt = sourceNextAllowedAt.get(sourceId) ?? 0;
    const waitMs = Math.max(0, nextAllowedAt - Date.now());
    if (waitMs > 0) {
      await sleepImpl(waitMs);
    }

    let fetched;
    try {
      fetched = await fetchHtmlImpl(url, sourceSite);
    } finally {
      const delayRange = resolveDelayRange(sourceSite);
      sourceNextAllowedAt.set(
        sourceId,
        Date.now() + randomBetween(delayRange.min, delayRange.max)
      );
    }

    if (!fetched.ok) {
      const failureStatus = normalizeHttpStatus(fetched.status);
      await pg.query(
        `UPDATE crawl_tasks
         SET stage = $2,
             status = $3,
             error = $4,
             http_status = $5,
             final_url = $6,
             fetch_channel = $7,
             decoded_charset = $8,
             fetch_lease_expires_at = NULL,
             fetch_worker = NULL,
             updated_at = NOW()
         WHERE id = $1`,
        [
          taskId,
          TASK_STAGES.fetch,
          TASK_STATUS.fetchFailed,
          fetched.error,
          failureStatus,
          fetched.finalUrl,
          fetched.fetchChannel,
          fetched.decodedCharset,
        ]
      );
      await pg.query(
        `INSERT INTO url_state(source_id, url, status, last_http_status, last_error, last_fetched_at, updated_at)
         VALUES($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, NOW(), NOW())
         ON CONFLICT(source_id, url)
         DO UPDATE SET
           status = EXCLUDED.status,
           last_http_status = EXCLUDED.last_http_status,
           last_error = EXCLUDED.last_error,
           last_fetched_at = NOW(),
           updated_at = NOW()`,
        [sourceId, url, "fetch_failed", failureStatus, fetched.error]
      );
      await recordPipelineEventImpl(pg, {
        runId,
        traceId,
        jobId,
        taskId,
        worker: workerServiceName,
        name: "fetch_failed",
        payload: {
          url,
          finalUrl: fetched.finalUrl,
          httpStatus: failureStatus,
          fetchChannel: fetched.fetchChannel,
          error: fetched.error,
          failureCategory: fetched.failureCategory ?? null,
          attemptCount: fetched.attemptCount ?? null,
          fallbackAttempted: Boolean(fetched.fallbackAttempted),
          fallbackSucceeded: Boolean(fetched.fallbackSucceeded),
          fallbackTriggerCategory: fetched.fallbackTriggerCategory ?? null,
          fallbackTriggerStatus: fetched.fallbackTriggerStatus ?? null,
          fallbackError: fetched.fallbackError ?? null,
        },
      });
      return;
    }

    const successStatus = normalizeHttpStatus(fetched.status);
    await pg.query(
      `UPDATE crawl_tasks
       SET stage = $2,
           status = $3,
           http_status = $4,
           raw_html = $5,
           final_url = $6,
           fetch_channel = $7,
           decoded_charset = $8,
           error = NULL,
           fetch_lease_expires_at = NULL,
           fetch_worker = NULL,
           updated_at = NOW()
       WHERE id = $1`,
      [
        taskId,
        TASK_STAGES.fetch,
        TASK_STATUS.queuedNormalize,
        successStatus,
        fetched.html,
        fetched.finalUrl,
        fetched.fetchChannel,
        fetched.decodedCharset,
      ]
    );
    await pg.query(
      `INSERT INTO url_state(source_id, url, status, last_http_status, last_error, last_fetched_at, updated_at)
       VALUES($1, $2, $3, $4, NULL, NOW(), NOW())
       ON CONFLICT(source_id, url)
       DO UPDATE SET
         status = EXCLUDED.status,
         last_http_status = EXCLUDED.last_http_status,
         last_error = NULL,
         last_fetched_at = NOW(),
         updated_at = NOW()`,
      [sourceId, url, "fetched", successStatus]
    );

    const next = {
      ...(runId ? { runId } : {}),
      traceId,
      jobId,
      taskId,
      sourceId,
      url,
      finalUrl: fetched.finalUrl,
      httpStatus: successStatus,
    };
    await pushQueueImpl(redis, workerConfig.queues.normalize, next);
    await recordPipelineEventImpl(pg, {
      runId,
      traceId,
      jobId,
      taskId,
      worker: workerServiceName,
      name: "fetch_ok",
      payload: {
        url,
        finalUrl: fetched.finalUrl,
        httpStatus: successStatus,
        fetchChannel: fetched.fetchChannel,
        queue: workerConfig.queues.normalize,
        attemptCount: fetched.attemptCount ?? null,
        fallbackAttempted: Boolean(fetched.fallbackAttempted),
        fallbackSucceeded: Boolean(fetched.fallbackSucceeded),
        fallbackTriggerCategory: fetched.fallbackTriggerCategory ?? null,
        fallbackTriggerStatus: fetched.fallbackTriggerStatus ?? null,
      },
    });
  } catch (error) {
    const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
    await pg.query(
      `UPDATE crawl_tasks
       SET stage = $2,
           status = $3,
           error = $4,
           fetch_lease_expires_at = NULL,
           fetch_worker = NULL,
           updated_at = NOW()
       WHERE id = $1`,
      [taskId, TASK_STAGES.fetch, TASK_STATUS.fetchFailed, errorMessage]
    );
    await pg.query(
      `INSERT INTO url_state(source_id, url, status, last_http_status, last_error, last_fetched_at, updated_at)
       VALUES($1, $2, $3, NULL, $4, NOW(), NOW())
       ON CONFLICT(source_id, url)
       DO UPDATE SET
         status = EXCLUDED.status,
         last_http_status = NULL,
         last_error = EXCLUDED.last_error,
         last_fetched_at = NOW(),
         updated_at = NOW()`,
      [sourceId, url, "fetch_failed", errorMessage]
    );
    await recordPipelineEventImpl(pg, {
      runId,
      traceId,
      jobId,
      taskId,
      worker: workerServiceName,
      name: "fetch_failed",
      payload: {
        url,
        finalUrl: url,
        httpStatus: null,
        fetchChannel: null,
        error: errorMessage,
        failureCategory: "worker_error",
        attemptCount: null,
        fallbackAttempted: false,
        fallbackSucceeded: false,
        fallbackTriggerCategory: null,
        fallbackTriggerStatus: null,
        fallbackError: null,
      },
    });
  }
}

async function runLoop(pg, redis) {
  let nextDatabaseSweepAt = 0;

  while (!stopping) {
    const now = Date.now();
    const preferDatabase = now >= nextDatabaseSweepAt;
    if (preferDatabase) {
      nextDatabaseSweepAt = now + Math.max(1000, Number(config.fetchDbSweepIntervalMs ?? 5000));
    }

    const acquired = await withClaimGate(async () =>
      acquireNextFetchTask(pg, redis, {
        queueName: config.queues.fetch,
        pollSeconds: config.pollSeconds,
        leaseMs: config.fetchStaleAfterMs,
        preferDatabase,
        workerName: serviceName,
        serviceName,
        sourceInFlight,
        popQueueImpl: popQueue,
        pushQueueImpl: pushQueue,
        sleepImpl: sleep,
      })
    );
    if (!acquired) {
      await sleep(150);
      continue;
    }

    const sourceId = String(acquired.claimed?.source_id || "").trim();
    try {
      await processClaimedTask(pg, redis, acquired.claimed);
    } catch (error) {
      log(serviceName, "error", "process fetch message failed", {
        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
        taskId: acquired.claimed?.id ?? null,
        sourceId: acquired.claimed?.source_id ?? null,
        origin: acquired.origin,
      });
    } finally {
      if (sourceId) {
        sourceInFlight.delete(sourceId);
      }
    }
  }
}

async function withClaimGate(fn) {
  const previous = claimGate;
  let release;
  claimGate = new Promise((resolve) => {
    release = resolve;
  });

  await previous;
  try {
    return await fn();
  } finally {
    release();
  }
}

async function runRecoveryLoop(pg, redis) {
  const intervalMs = Math.max(1000, Number(config.fetchRecoveryIntervalMs ?? 30000));
  while (!stopping) {
    try {
      const result = await recoverStaleFetchTasks(pg, redis, {
        staleAfterMs: config.fetchStaleAfterMs,
        batchSize: config.fetchRecoveryBatchSize,
        queueName: config.queues.fetch,
        workerName: serviceName,
        pushQueueImpl: pushQueue,
        recordPipelineEventImpl: recordPipelineEvent,
      });
      if (result.recoveredCount > 0) {
        log(serviceName, "warn", "recovered stale fetching tasks", {
          recoveredCount: result.recoveredCount,
          taskIds: result.tasks.map((task) => task.id),
        });
      }
    } catch (error) {
      log(serviceName, "error", "recover stale fetching tasks failed", {
        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
      });
    }
    await sleep(intervalMs);
  }
}

async function main() {
  const pg = createPgPool(config.db);
  const redis = createRedisClient(config.redis);
  try {
    await ensurePlatformSchema(pg);
    const loops = Array.from(
      { length: Math.max(1, config.fetchConcurrency) },
      () => runLoop(pg, redis)
    );
    loops.push(runRecoveryLoop(pg, redis));
    await Promise.all(loops);
  } finally {
    await redis.quit();
    await pg.end();
  }
}

function isMainModule(meta) {
  const entry = process.argv[1];
  return Boolean(entry) && meta.url === pathToFileURL(entry).href;
}

if (isMainModule(import.meta)) {
  main().catch((error) => {
    log(serviceName, "error", "worker-fetch-http crashed", {
      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
    });
    process.exit(1);
  });
}

shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.6 seconds Output: import process from "node:process"; import { pathToFileURL } from "node:url"; import { TASK_STAGES, TASK_STATUS, validateNormalizeQue...

Exit code: 0

Output:
import process from "node:process";
import { pathToFileURL } from "node:url";
import { TASK_STAGES, TASK_STATUS, validateNormalizeQueueMessage } from "@papaweb/contracts";
import {
  createPgPool,
  createRedisClient,
  ensurePlatformSchema,
  getPlatformConfig,
  isSourceRunActive,
  log,
  popQueue,
  pushQueue,
  recordPipelineEvent,
  sleep,
} from "@papaweb/shared";

const serviceName = "worker-normalize";
const config = getPlatformConfig();
let stopping = false;

process.on("SIGINT", () => {
  stopping = true;
});
process.on("SIGTERM", () => {
  stopping = true;
});

const HTML_ENTITY_MAP = Object.freeze({
  amp: "&",
  lt: "<",
  gt: ">",
  quot: '"',
  apos: "'",
  nbsp: " ",
});

function cleanText(value) {
  return String(value || "").replace(/\s+/g, " ").trim();
}

function stripTags(value) {
  return String(value || "").replace(/<[^>]+>/g, " ");
}

function decodeHtmlEntities(value) {
  return String(value || "").replace(/&(#x?[0-9a-f]+|[a-z]+);/gi, (match, entity) => {
    const raw = String(entity || "").trim();
    if (!raw) return match;

    if (raw[0] === "#") {
      const isHex = raw[1]?.toLowerCase() === "x";
      const digits = isHex ? raw.slice(2) : raw.slice(1);
      const codePoint = Number.parseInt(digits, isHex ? 16 : 10);
      if (!Number.isInteger(codePoint) || codePoint <= 0) {
        return match;
      }
      try {
        return String.fromCodePoint(codePoint);
      } catch {
        return match;
      }
    }

    return HTML_ENTITY_MAP[raw.toLowerCase()] ?? match;
  });
}

function clipText(value, maxLength) {
  return cleanText(value).slice(0, maxLength);
}

function parseTagAttributes(tag) {
  const attrs = {};
  const pattern = /([^\s=\/>]+)\s*=\s*(?:"([^"]*)"|'([^']*)'|([^\s"'=<>`]+))/g;
  let match;
  while ((match = pattern.exec(String(tag || "")))) {
    const name = String(match[1] || "").trim().toLowerCase();
    if (!name) continue;
    attrs[name] = match[2] ?? match[3] ?? match[4] ?? "";
  }
  return attrs;
}

function collectTagAttributes(html, tagName) {
  const matches = String(html || "").match(new RegExp(`<${tagName}\\b[^>]*>`, "gi")) ?? [];
  return matches.map((tag) => parseTagAttributes(tag));
}

function normalizePageUrl(raw, baseUrl = "") {
  try {
    const url = new URL(String(raw || "").trim(), baseUrl || undefined);
    if (!["http:", "https:"].includes(url.protocol)) {
      return "";
    }
    url.hash = "";
    return url.toString();
  } catch {
    return "";
  }
}

export function pickTitle(html, url) {
  const titleMatch = String(html || "").match(/<title[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/title>/i);
  const title = clipText(decodeHtmlEntities(stripTags(titleMatch?.[1] ?? "")), 200);
  if (title.length > 0) return title;

  for (const attrs of collectTagAttributes(html, "meta")) {
    const name = String(attrs.name || attrs.property || "").trim().toLowerCase();
    if (!["og:title", "twitter:title"].includes(name)) continue;
    const content = clipText(decodeHtmlEntities(attrs.content || ""), 200);
    if (content.length > 0) return content;
  }

  return normalizePageUrl(url) || String(url || "");
}

export function pickSummary(html) {
  for (const attrs of collectTagAttributes(html, "meta")) {
    const name = String(attrs.name || attrs.property || "").trim().toLowerCase();
    if (!["description", "og:description", "twitter:description"].includes(name)) continue;
    const content = clipText(decodeHtmlEntities(attrs.content || ""), 300);
    if (content.length > 0) return content;
  }

  const bodyText = String(html || "")
    .replace(/<head[\s\S]*?<\/head>/gi, " ")
    .replace(/<script[\s\S]*?<\/script>/gi, " ")
    .replace(/<style[\s\S]*?<\/style>/gi, " ")
    .replace(/<noscript[\s\S]*?<\/noscript>/gi, " ")
    .replace(/<template[\s\S]*?<\/template>/gi, " ")
    .replace(/<svg[\s\S]*?<\/svg>/gi, " ");
  return clipText(decodeHtmlEntities(stripTags(bodyText)), 300);
}

export function pickCanonicalUrl(html, finalUrl, fallbackUrl = "") {
  const normalizedFinalUrl = normalizePageUrl(finalUrl, fallbackUrl);
  const normalizedFallbackUrl = normalizePageUrl(fallbackUrl);
  const baseUrl = normalizedFinalUrl || normalizedFallbackUrl;

  for (const attrs of collectTagAttributes(html, "link")) {
    const rel = String(attrs.rel || "")
      .trim()
      .toLowerCase()
      .split(/\s+/)
      .filter(Boolean);
    if (!rel.includes("canonical")) continue;
    const href = normalizePageUrl(attrs.href || "", baseUrl);
    if (href) return href;
  }

  for (const attrs of collectTagAttributes(html, "meta")) {
    const property = String(attrs.property || attrs.name || "").trim().toLowerCase();
    if (property !== "og:url") continue;
    const content = normalizePageUrl(attrs.content || "", baseUrl);
    if (content) return content;
  }

  return normalizedFinalUrl || normalizedFallbackUrl || String(finalUrl || fallbackUrl || "");
}

export async function processMessage(pg, redis, message, options = {}) {
  const workerConfig = options.config ?? config;
  const isSourceRunActiveImpl = options.isSourceRunActiveImpl ?? isSourceRunActive;
  const logImpl = options.logImpl ?? log;
  const pushQueueImpl = options.pushQueueImpl ?? pushQueue;
  const recordPipelineEventImpl = options.recordPipelineEventImpl ?? recordPipelineEvent;
  const nowIsoImpl = options.nowIsoImpl ?? (() => new Date().toISOString());
  const workerServiceName = options.serviceName ?? serviceName;
  const payload = validateNormalizeQueueMessage(message);
  const { traceId, jobId, taskId, sourceId, url } = payload;
  const runId = payload.runId ?? "";
  const httpStatus = Number(payload.httpStatus ?? 0);

  if (!(await isSourceRunActiveImpl(pg, sourceId, runId))) {
    logImpl(workerServiceName, "warn", "skip stale normalize task", {
      taskId,
      sourceId,
      jobId,
      runId: runId || null,
    });
    return;
  }

  const taskRes = await pg.query(
    "SELECT raw_html, final_url FROM crawl_tasks WHERE id = $1 LIMIT 1",
    [taskId]
  );
  if (taskRes.rowCount === 0) {
    throw new Error(`task not found: ${taskId}`);
  }
  const html = String(taskRes.rows[0].raw_html ?? "");
  const finalUrl = String(taskRes.rows[0].final_url ?? "").trim() || url;
  const canonicalUrl = pickCanonicalUrl(html, finalUrl, url);
  const normalized = {
    canonicalUrl,
    title: pickTitle(html, canonicalUrl),
    summary: pickSummary(html),
    sourceId,
    normalizedAt: nowIsoImpl(),
  };

  await pg.query(
    `UPDATE crawl_tasks
     SET stage = $2, status = $3, normalized = $4::jsonb, updated_at = NOW()
     WHERE id = $1`,
    [taskId, TASK_STAGES.normalize, TASK_STATUS.queuedQuality, JSON.stringify(normalized)]
  );

  await pg.query(
    `INSERT INTO url_state(source_id, url, status, last_http_status, title, summary, last_fetched_at, updated_at)
     VALUES($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, NOW(), NOW())
     ON CONFLICT(source_id, url)
     DO UPDATE SET
       status = EXCLUDED.status,
       last_http_status = EXCLUDED.last_http_status,
       title = EXCLUDED.title,
       summary = EXCLUDED.summary,
       last_fetched_at = NOW(),
       updated_at = NOW()`,
    [sourceId, url, "normalized", httpStatus || null, normalized.title, normalized.summary]
  );

  const next = {
    ...(runId ? { runId } : {}),
    traceId,
    jobId,
    taskId,
    sourceId,
    url,
    httpStatus,
    normalized,
  };
  await pushQueueImpl(redis, workerConfig.queues.quality, next);
  await recordPipelineEventImpl(pg, {
    runId,
    traceId,
    jobId,
    taskId,
    worker: workerServiceName,
    name: "normalized",
    payload: {
      queue: workerConfig.queues.quality,
      canonicalUrl: normalized.canonicalUrl,
      title: normalized.title,
    },
  });
}

async function main() {
  const pg = createPgPool(config.db);
  const redis = createRedisClient(config.redis);
  try {
    await ensurePlatformSchema(pg);
    while (!stopping) {
      const message = await popQueue(redis, config.queues.normalize, config.pollSeconds);
      if (!message) {
        await sleep(150);
        continue;
      }
      try {
        await processMessage(pg, redis, message);
      } catch (error) {
        log(serviceName, "error", "process normalize message failed", {
          error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
          message,
        });
      }
    }
  } finally {
    await redis.quit();
    await pg.end();
  }
}

function isMainModule(meta) {
  const entry = process.argv[1];
  return Boolean(entry) && meta.url === pathToFileURL(entry).href;
}

if (isMainModule(import.meta)) {
  main().catch((error) => {
    log(serviceName, "error", "worker-normalize crashed", {
      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
    });
    process.exit(1);
  });
}

import process from "node:process";
import { pathToFileURL } from "node:url";
import { validateQualityQueueMessage } from "@papaweb/contracts";
import { DEFAULT_POLICY, evaluateQuality } from "@papaweb/policy-engine";
import {
  createPgPool,
  createRedisClient,
  ensurePlatformSchema,
  ensurePolicyVersion,
  getPlatformConfig,
  isSourceRunActive,
  loadActivePolicy,
  log,
  persistTaskQualityResult,
  popQueue,
  pushQueue,
  recordPipelineEvent,
  sleep,
} from "@papaweb/shared";

const serviceName = "worker-quality";
const config = getPlatformConfig();
let stopping = false;

process.on("SIGINT", () => {
  stopping = true;
});
process.on("SIGTERM", () => {
  stopping = true;
});

export async function processMessage(pg, redis, message, options = {}) {
  const workerConfig = options.config ?? config;
  const isSourceRunActiveImpl = options.isSourceRunActiveImpl ?? isSourceRunActive;
  const loadActivePolicyImpl = options.loadActivePolicyImpl ?? loadActivePolicy;
  const evaluateQualityImpl = options.evaluateQualityImpl ?? evaluateQuality;
  const persistTaskQualityResultImpl = options.persistTaskQualityResultImpl ?? persistTaskQualityResult;
  const pushQueueImpl = options.pushQueueImpl ?? pushQueue;
  const recordPipelineEventImpl = options.recordPipelineEventImpl ?? recordPipelineEvent;
  const logImpl = options.logImpl ?? log;
  const workerServiceName = options.serviceName ?? serviceName;
  const payload = validateQualityQueueMessage(message);
  const { traceId, jobId, taskId, sourceId, url } = payload;
  const runId = payload.runId ?? "";
  const httpStatus = Number(payload.httpStatus ?? 0);

  if (!(await isSourceRunActiveImpl(pg, sourceId, runId))) {
    logImpl(workerServiceName, "warn", "skip stale quality task", {
      taskId,
      sourceId,
      jobId,
      runId: runId || null,
    });
    return;
  }

  const taskRes = await pg.query("SELECT normalized FROM crawl_tasks WHERE id = $1 LIMIT 1", [taskId]);
  if (taskRes.rowCount === 0) {
    throw new Error(`task not found: ${taskId}`);
  }
  const normalized = taskRes.rows[0].normalized ?? {};
  const policy = await loadActivePolicyImpl(pg, {
    ...DEFAULT_POLICY,
    version: workerConfig.qualityPolicyVersion,
  });

  const result = evaluateQualityImpl(
    {
      title: normalized.title,
      summary: normalized.summary,
      httpStatus,
    },
    policy
  );

  await persistTaskQualityResultImpl(pg, taskId, result);

  await recordPipelineEventImpl(pg, {
    runId,
    traceId,
    jobId,
    taskId,
    worker: workerServiceName,
    name: "quality_checked",
    payload: result,
  });

  if (!result.pass) {
    return;
  }

  await pushQueueImpl(redis, workerConfig.queues.publish, {
    ...(runId ? { runId } : {}),
    traceId,
    jobId,
    taskId,
    sourceId,
    url,
  });
}

async function main() {
  const pg = createPgPool(config.db);
  const redis = createRedisClient(config.redis);
  try {
    await ensurePlatformSchema(pg);
    await ensurePolicyVersion(pg, DEFAULT_POLICY.version, DEFAULT_POLICY);

    while (!stopping) {
      const message = await popQueue(redis, config.queues.quality, config.pollSeconds);
      if (!message) {
        await sleep(150);
        continue;
      }
      try {
        await processMessage(pg, redis, message);
      } catch (error) {
        log(serviceName, "error", "process quality message failed", {
          error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
          message,
        });
      }
    }
  } finally {
    await redis.quit();
    await pg.end();
  }
}

function isMainModule(meta) {
  const entry = process.argv[1];
  return Boolean(entry) && meta.url === pathToFileURL(entry).href;
}

if (isMainModule(import.meta)) {
  main().catch((error) => {
    log(serviceName, "error", "worker-quality crashed", {
      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
    });
    process.exit(1);
  });
}

Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.5 seconds
Output:
import { decodeHtmlBytes } from "./html-decoder.mjs";

const DEFAULT_PINCHTAB_STATUSES = [403, 429, 503];
const DEFAULT_HTTP_RETRY_STATUSES = [408, 425, 429, 500, 502, 503, 504];

function cleanText(value) {
  return String(value || "").replace(/\s+/g, " ").trim();
}

function normalizeStatus(value) {
  const n = Number(value);
  return Number.isInteger(n) && n > 0 ? n : 0;
}

function normalizeOptionalStatus(value) {
  const normalized = normalizeStatus(value);
  return normalized > 0 ? normalized : null;
}

function formatFailureMessage(category, detail) {
  const normalizedCategory = cleanText(category);
  const normalizedDetail = cleanText(detail);
  if (!normalizedCategory) return normalizedDetail || null;
  if (!normalizedDetail) return normalizedCategory;
  if (normalizedDetail.toLowerCase().startsWith(`${normalizedCategory.toLowerCase()}:`)) {
    return normalizedDetail;
  }
  return `${normalizedCategory}: ${normalizedDetail}`;
}

function escapeHtml(value) {
  return String(value || "")
    .replaceAll("&", "&amp;")
    .replaceAll("<", "&lt;")
    .replaceAll(">", "&gt;")
    .replaceAll('"', "&quot;");
}

function buildPseudoHtmlFromText(title, text) {
  const safeTitle = escapeHtml(cleanText(title));
  const lines = String(text || "")
    .split(/\r?\n+/)
    .map((line) => cleanText(line))
    .filter(Boolean)
    .slice(0, 120);
  const body = lines.map((line) => `<p>${escapeHtml(line)}</p>`).join("");
  return `<!doctype html><html><head><meta charset="utf-8"><title>${safeTitle}</title></head><body>${body}</body></html>`;
}

function pinchtabAuthHeaders(token) {
  if (!token) return {};
  return { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` };
}

function createTimeoutSignal(timeoutMs) {
  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timer = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), timeoutMs);
  return {
    signal: controller.signal,
    clear() {
      clearTimeout(timer);
    },
  };
}

function sleep(ms) {
  return new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, ms));
}

function retryDelayForAttempt(attempt) {
  return (attempt + 1) * 1200;
}

function classifyRequestError(error, timeoutMs) {
  const errorName = String(error?.name || "").trim();
  if (errorName === "AbortError") {
    return {
      failureCategory: "timeout",
      error: `request timed out after ${timeoutMs}ms`,
    };
  }

  return {
    failureCategory: "network_error",
    error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
  };
}

function isRetryableHttpStatus(status) {
  return DEFAULT_HTTP_RETRY_STATUSES.includes(normalizeStatus(status));
}

function buildFetchSuccess(result, meta = {}) {
  return {
    ...result,
    failureCategory: null,
    attemptCount: Number(meta.attemptCount ?? 1),
    fallbackAttempted: Boolean(meta.fallbackAttempted),
    fallbackSucceeded: Boolean(meta.fallbackSucceeded),
    fallbackTriggerCategory: meta.fallbackTriggerCategory ?? null,
    fallbackTriggerStatus: normalizeOptionalStatus(meta.fallbackTriggerStatus),
    fallbackError: meta.fallbackError ?? null,
  };
}

function buildFetchFailure(result, meta = {}) {
  return {
    ok: false,
    status: normalizeStatus(result.status),
    finalUrl: cleanText(result.finalUrl || result.url) || cleanText(result.url),
    text: String(result.text || ""),
    durationMs: Number(result.durationMs ?? 0),
    contentType: String(result.contentType || ""),
    contentLength: Number(result.contentLength ?? 0),
    decodedCharset: String(result.decodedCharset || ""),
    error: formatFailureMessage(meta.failureCategory, result.error),
    fetchChannel: String(result.fetchChannel || "http"),
    failureCategory: meta.failureCategory ?? null,
    attemptCount: Number(meta.attemptCount ?? 1),
    fallbackAttempted: Boolean(meta.fallbackAttempted),
    fallbackSucceeded: Boolean(meta.fallbackSucceeded),
    fallbackTriggerCategory: meta.fallbackTriggerCategory ?? null,
    fallbackTriggerStatus: normalizeOptionalStatus(meta.fallbackTriggerStatus),
    fallbackError: meta.fallbackError ?? null,
  };
}

async function readJsonResponse(response) {
  const raw = await response.text();
  try {
    return JSON.parse(raw);
  } catch {
    return null;
  }
}

export function parsePinchtabStatuses(value, fallback = DEFAULT_PINCHTAB_STATUSES) {
  if (!value) return [...fallback];
  if (Array.isArray(value)) {
    return value.map((item) => Number(item)).filter((item) => Number.isInteger(item) && item > 0);
  }
  return String(value)
    .split(",")
    .map((item) => Number(item.trim()))
    .filter((item) => Number.isInteger(item) && item > 0);
}

export function buildSourceFetchOptions(sourceSite, config, overrides = {}) {
  const meta = sourceSite?.meta && typeof sourceSite.meta === "object" ? sourceSite.meta : {};
  const pinchtabModeRaw = String(
    overrides.pinchtabMode ?? meta.pinchtab_mode ?? "fallback"
  ).toLowerCase();
  const pinchtabMode = ["fallback", "always", "disable"].includes(pinchtabModeRaw)
    ? pinchtabModeRaw
    : "fallback";
  const renderViaPinchtab = Boolean(
    overrides.renderViaPinchtab ?? meta.render_via_pinchtab ?? false
  );
  const pinchtabStatuses = parsePinchtabStatuses(
    overrides.pinchtabStatuses ?? config.pinchtabStatuses,
    DEFAULT_PINCHTAB_STATUSES
  );

  return {
    timeoutMs: Number(overrides.timeoutMs ?? config.fetchTimeoutMs ?? 15000),
    retries: Number(overrides.retries ?? config.fetchRetries ?? 1),
    headers: {
      "user-agent": String(
        overrides.userAgent ?? config.httpUserAgent ?? "papaweb-platform/0.2"
      ),
      "accept-language": String(
        overrides.acceptLanguage ?? config.acceptLanguage ?? "en-US,en;q=0.9,zh-CN;q=0.8"
      ),
    },
    pinchtab:
      renderViaPinchtab && config.pinchtabBaseUrl && pinchtabMode !== "disable"
        ? {
            baseUrl: String(config.pinchtabBaseUrl),
            timeoutMs: Number(config.pinchtabTimeoutMs ?? 45000),
            waitMs: Number(config.pinchtabWaitMs ?? 1200),
            statuses: pinchtabStatuses.length > 0 ? pinchtabStatuses : DEFAULT_PINCHTAB_STATUSES,
            token: String(config.pinchtabToken ?? ""),
            mode: pinchtabMode,
          }
        : null,
  };
}

async function pinchtabEvaluate(baseUrl, tabId, expression, timeoutMs, token) {
  const ctrl = createTimeoutSignal(timeoutMs);
  try {
    const response = await fetch(
      `${baseUrl.replace(/\/+$/, "")}/tabs/${encodeURIComponent(tabId)}/evaluate`,
      {
        method: "POST",
        headers: {
          "content-type": "application/json",
          ...pinchtabAuthHeaders(token),
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({ expression }),
        signal: ctrl.signal,
      }
    );
    const data = await readJsonResponse(response);
    return { ok: response.ok, status: response.status, data };
  } finally {
    ctrl.clear();
  }
}

async function readPinchtabHealth(baseUrl, timeoutMs, token) {
  const ctrl = createTimeoutSignal(timeoutMs);
  try {
    const response = await fetch(`${baseUrl.replace(/\/+$/, "")}/health`, {
      method: "GET",
      headers: {
        ...pinchtabAuthHeaders(token),
      },
      signal: ctrl.signal,
    });
    const data = await readJsonResponse(response);
    return { ok: response.ok, status: response.status, data };
  } catch (error) {
    return {
      ok: false,
      status: 0,
      data: null,
      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
    };
  } finally {
    ctrl.clear();
  }
}

async function waitForPinchtabBrowserReady(baseUrl, timeoutMs, token, options = {}) {
  const started = Date.now();
  const waitBudgetMs = Math.max(500, Math.min(Number(timeoutMs) || 0, 5000));
  const pendingStatuses = new Set(["starting", "launching", "booting", "initializing"]);
  const sleepImpl = options.sleepImpl ?? sleep;

  while (Date.now() - started <= waitBudgetMs) {
    const health = await readPinchtabHealth(baseUrl, Math.min(waitBudgetMs, 2000), token);
    const instanceStatus = String(health.data?.defaultInstance?.status || "")
      .trim()
      .toLowerCase();

    if (!instanceStatus || !pendingStatuses.has(instanceStatus)) {
      return;
    }

    const remainingMs = waitBudgetMs - (Date.now() - started);
    if (remainingMs <= 0) {
      return;
    }
    await sleepImpl(Math.min(750, remainingMs));
  }
}

async function openPinchtabTab(url, options) {
  const { baseUrl, timeoutMs, headers, token } = options;
  const extraRetries = Math.max(0, Number(options.openRetries ?? 1));
  const retryableStatuses = new Set([408, 425, 429, 500, 502, 503, 504]);
  const sleepImpl = options.sleepImpl ?? sleep;
  let lastFailure = {
    ok: false,
    status: 0,
    error: "pinchtab open tab failed",
  };

  for (let attempt = 0; attempt <= extraRetries; attempt += 1) {
    if (options.waitForBrowserReady !== false) {
      await waitForPinchtabBrowserReady(baseUrl, timeoutMs, token, {
        sleepImpl,
      });
    }
    const openCtrl = createTimeoutSignal(timeoutMs);
    try {
      const openRes = await fetch(`${baseUrl.replace(/\/+$/, "")}/tab`, {
        method: "POST",
        headers: {
          "content-type": "application/json",
          ...(headers?.["user-agent"] ? { "x-user-agent": headers["user-agent"] } : {}),
          ...pinchtabAuthHeaders(token),
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({ action: "new", url }),
        signal: openCtrl.signal,
      });
      openCtrl.clear();

      if (openRes.ok) {
        const openData = await readJsonResponse(openRes);
        const tabId = String(openData?.tabId || "");
        if (tabId) {
          return {
            ok: true,
            status: openRes.status,
            tabId,
            data: openData,
          };
        }
        lastFailure = {
          ok: false,
          status: 0,
          error: "pinchtab missing tabId",
        };
      } else {
        lastFailure = {
          ok: false,
          status: openRes.status,
          error: `pinchtab open tab failed: ${openRes.status}`,
        };
      }
    } catch (error) {
      openCtrl.clear();
      lastFailure = {
        ok: false,
        status: 0,
        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
      };
    }

    const shouldRetry =
      attempt < extraRetries &&
      (lastFailure.status === 0 || retryableStatuses.has(lastFailure.status));
    if (shouldRetry) {
      await sleepImpl((attempt + 1) * 1500);
      continue;
    }
    break;
  }

  return lastFailure;
}

async function fetchTextViaPinchtab(url, options) {
  const { baseUrl, timeoutMs, waitMs, headers, token } = options;
  if (!baseUrl) return null;

  const started = Date.now();
  const sleepImpl = options.sleepImpl ?? sleep;
  let tabId = "";
  try {
    const openResult = await openPinchtabTab(url, {
      baseUrl,
      timeoutMs,
      headers,
      token,
      openRetries: options.openRetries,
      sleepImpl,
    });

    if (!openResult.ok) {
      return buildFetchFailure(
        {
          url,
          status: openResult.status,
          finalUrl: url,
          text: "",
          durationMs: Date.now() - started,
          contentType: "application/json",
          contentLength: 0,
          decodedCharset: "utf-8",
          error: openResult.error,
          fetchChannel: "pinchtab",
        },
        {
          failureCategory: "pinchtab_error",
          attemptCount: 1,
        }
      );
    }

    tabId = openResult.tabId;
    const openData = openResult.data ?? null;

    if (waitMs > 0) {
      await sleepImpl(waitMs);
    }

    try {
      const evalRes = await pinchtabEvaluate(
        baseUrl,
        tabId,
        "(() => ({ html: document.documentElement.outerHTML, url: location.href, title: document.title }))()",
        timeoutMs,
        token
      );
      if (evalRes.ok) {
        const result = evalRes.data?.result ?? null;
        if (result && typeof result.html === "string" && result.html.trim().length > 0) {
          return buildFetchSuccess(
            {
              ok: true,
              status: evalRes.status || 200,
              finalUrl: cleanText(result.url || openData?.url || url),
              text: result.html,
              durationMs: Date.now() - started,
              contentType: "text/html; charset=utf-8",
              contentLength: Buffer.byteLength(result.html, "utf8"),
              decodedCharset: "utf-8",
              error: null,
              fetchChannel: "pinchtab",
            },
            {
              attemptCount: 1,
            }
          );
        }
      }
    } catch {
      // Fall back to /text below.
    }

    const textCtrl = createTimeoutSignal(timeoutMs);
    const textRes = await fetch(
      `${baseUrl.replace(/\/+$/, "")}/text?tabId=${encodeURIComponent(tabId)}`,
      {
        method: "GET",
        headers: {
          ...pinchtabAuthHeaders(token),
        },
        signal: textCtrl.signal,
      }
    );
    textCtrl.clear();

    const textRaw = await textRes.text();
    let parsed;
    try {
      parsed = JSON.parse(textRaw);
    } catch {
      parsed = null;
    }

    const renderedTitle = cleanText(parsed?.title || "");
    const renderedText = cleanText(parsed?.text || "");
    const finalUrl = cleanText(parsed?.url || openData?.url || url);
    const pseudoHtml = buildPseudoHtmlFromText(renderedTitle, renderedText);

    if (textRes.ok) {
      return buildFetchSuccess(
        {
          ok: true,
          status: textRes.status,
          finalUrl,
          text: pseudoHtml,
          durationMs: Date.now() - started,
          contentType: "text/html; charset=utf-8",
          contentLength: Buffer.byteLength(pseudoHtml, "utf8"),
          decodedCharset: "utf-8",
          error: null,
          fetchChannel: "pinchtab",
        },
        {
          attemptCount: 1,
        }
      );
    }

    return buildFetchFailure(
      {
        url,
        status: textRes.status,
        finalUrl,
        text: pseudoHtml,
        durationMs: Date.now() - started,
        contentType: "text/html; charset=utf-8",
        contentLength: Buffer.byteLength(pseudoHtml, "utf8"),
        decodedCharset: "utf-8",
        error: `pinchtab text failed: ${textRes.status}`,
        fetchChannel: "pinchtab",
      },
      {
        failureCategory: "pinchtab_error",
        attemptCount: 1,
      }
    );
  } catch (error) {
    const classified = classifyRequestError(error, timeoutMs);
    return buildFetchFailure(
      {
        url,
        status: 0,
        finalUrl: url,
        text: "",
        durationMs: Date.now() - started,
        contentType: "",
        contentLength: 0,
        decodedCharset: "",
        error: classified.error,
        fetchChannel: "pinchtab",
      },
      {
        failureCategory: classified.failureCategory,
        attemptCount: 1,
      }
    );
  } finally {
    if (tabId) {
      try {
        const closeCtrl = createTimeoutSignal(5000);
        await fetch(`${baseUrl.replace(/\/+$/, "")}/tab`, {
          method: "POST",
          headers: {
            "content-type": "application/json",
            ...pinchtabAuthHeaders(token),
          },
          body: JSON.stringify({ action: "close", tabId }),
          signal: closeCtrl.signal,
        });
        closeCtrl.clear();
      } catch {
        // Ignore close failure.
      }
    }
  }
}

export async function fetchTextResource(url, options = {}) {
  const timeoutMs = Number(options.timeoutMs ?? 15000);
  const retries = Number(options.retries ?? 1);
  const headers = options.headers && typeof options.headers === "object" ? options.headers : {};
  const pinchtab = options.pinchtab ?? null;
  const sleepImpl = options.sleepImpl ?? sleep;
  const started = Date.now();

  if (pinchtab?.mode === "always" && pinchtab?.baseUrl) {
    return fetchTextViaPinchtab(url, {
      baseUrl: pinchtab.baseUrl,
      timeoutMs: pinchtab.timeoutMs ?? timeoutMs,
      waitMs: pinchtab.waitMs ?? 1000,
      token: pinchtab.token,
      headers,
      sleepImpl,
    });
  }

  for (let attempt = 0; attempt <= retries; attempt += 1) {
    const attemptCount = attempt + 1;
    const ctrl = createTimeoutSignal(timeoutMs);
    try {
      const response = await fetch(url, {
        method: "GET",
        redirect: "follow",
        headers,
        signal: ctrl.signal,
      });
      const contentType = response.headers.get("content-type") ?? "";
      const bytes = new Uint8Array(await response.arrayBuffer());
      const decoded = decodeHtmlBytes(bytes, contentType);
      ctrl.clear();

      if (response.ok) {
        return buildFetchSuccess(
          {
            ok: true,
            status: response.status,
            finalUrl: response.url,
            text: decoded.text,
            durationMs: Date.now() - started,
            contentType,
            contentLength: Number(response.headers.get("content-length") ?? bytes.byteLength),
            decodedCharset: decoded.charset,
            error: null,
            fetchChannel: "http",
          },
          {
            attemptCount,
          }
        );
      }

      const canRetryHttp = attempt < retries && isRetryableHttpStatus(response.status);
      if (canRetryHttp) {
        await sleepImpl(retryDelayForAttempt(attempt));
        continue;
      }

      const shouldFallbackToPinchtab =
        Boolean(pinchtab?.baseUrl) &&
        (pinchtab?.statuses ?? DEFAULT_PINCHTAB_STATUSES).includes(response.status);
      if (shouldFallbackToPinchtab) {
        const fallback = await fetchTextViaPinchtab(url, {
          baseUrl: pinchtab.baseUrl,
          timeoutMs: pinchtab.timeoutMs ?? timeoutMs,
          waitMs: pinchtab.waitMs ?? 1000,
          token: pinchtab.token,
          headers,
          openRetries: Math.max(1, retries),
          sleepImpl,
        });
        if (fallback?.ok) {
          return buildFetchSuccess(fallback, {
            attemptCount,
            fallbackAttempted: true,
            fallbackSucceeded: true,
            fallbackTriggerCategory: "http_error",
            fallbackTriggerStatus: response.status,
          });
        }
        return buildFetchFailure(
          {
            url,
            status: response.status,
            finalUrl: fallback?.finalUrl || response.url || url,
            text: "",
            durationMs: Date.now() - started,
            contentType,
            contentLength: Number(response.headers.get("content-length") ?? bytes.byteLength),
            decodedCharset: decoded.charset,
            error: fallback?.error || `pinchtab fallback failed after http status ${response.status}`,
            fetchChannel: fallback?.fetchChannel || "pinchtab",
          },
          {
            failureCategory: "pinchtab_fallback_failed",
            attemptCount,
            fallbackAttempted: true,
            fallbackSucceeded: false,
            fallbackTriggerCategory: "http_error",
            fallbackTriggerStatus: response.status,
            fallbackError: fallback?.error ?? null,
          }
        );
      }

      return buildFetchFailure(
        {
          url,
          status: response.status,
          finalUrl: response.url || url,
          text: decoded.text,
          durationMs: Date.now() - started,
          contentType,
          contentLength: Number(response.headers.get("content-length") ?? bytes.byteLength),
          decodedCharset: decoded.charset,
          error: `http status ${response.status}`,
          fetchChannel: "http",
        },
        {
          failureCategory: "http_error",
          attemptCount,
        }
      );
    } catch (error) {
      ctrl.clear();
      const classified = classifyRequestError(error, timeoutMs);

      if (attempt < retries) {
        await sleepImpl(retryDelayForAttempt(attempt));
        continue;
      }

      return buildFetchFailure(
        {
          url,
          status: 0,
          finalUrl: url,
          text: "",
          durationMs: Date.now() - started,
          contentType: "",
          contentLength: 0,
          decodedCharset: "",
          error: classified.error,
          fetchChannel: "http",
        },
        {
          failureCategory: classified.failureCategory,
          attemptCount,
        }
      );
    }
  }

  return buildFetchFailure(
    {
      url,
      status: 0,
      finalUrl: url,
      text: "",
      durationMs: Date.now() - started,
      contentType: "",
      contentLength: 0,
      decodedCharset: "",
      error: "unknown fetch error",
      fetchChannel: "http",
    },
    {
      failureCategory: "network_error",
      attemptCount: retries + 1,
    }
  );
}

assistant #417 final_answer 04:57:18

可以借，但不要直接照搬 BettaFish 的“多 Agent + ForumEngine”。你们现在最适合借的是它的“需求编译逻辑”，不是它的“自由探索式运行时”。 你们仓库现在其实已经有一条很清晰的执行链了：[`query-api`](d:/demo1/papaweb/services/query-api/src/index.mjs#L137) 负责接任务，[`worker-fetch-http`](d:/demo1/papa...

Expand full message

可以借，但不要直接照搬 BettaFish 的“多 Agent + ForumEngine”。你们现在最适合借的是它的“需求编译逻辑”，不是它的“自由探索式运行时”。

你们仓库现在其实已经有一条很清晰的执行链了：[query-api](d:/demo1/papaweb/services/query-api/src/index.mjs#L137) 负责接任务，[worker-fetch-http](d:/demo1/papaweb/services/worker-fetch-http/src/index.mjs#L90) 负责抓取，[platform-fetch](d:/demo1/papaweb/packages/shared/src/platform-fetch.mjs#L148) 已经支持按源站配置 http/pinchtab 路由，后面还有 [worker-normalize](d:/demo1/papaweb/services/worker-normalize/src/index.mjs#L161) 和 [worker-quality](d:/demo1/papaweb/services/worker-quality/src/index.mjs#L32)。所以你们缺的不是“再造一套抓取系统”，而是缺一层把“人话”翻成“结构化任务”的入口层。

我建议你们走这条路：Agent 化输入，SOP 化执行。也就是用户在 IM 里仍然说自然语言，但系统先把话编译成 IntentSpec/TaskSpec，再丢给现有流水线，而不是让大模型直接驱动浏览器。

最值得从 BettaFish 借的有 4 个点：
- keyword_optimizer 思路。它 README 里就明确有这一层，说明它也不是一上来就全靠大模型自由发挥，而是先做关键词优化和任务拆分。
- “专用引擎”思路。BettaFish 把 Query/Media/Insight/Report 分开，你们也应该分成“搜索任务”“媒体任务”“监控任务”“报告任务”，不要一个入口兜所有逻辑。
- state + nodes 思路。一次任务拆成几个确定阶段，而不是一个大 prompt 跑到底。
- IR/report 思路。结果先落统一中间表示，再生成 IM 回复、报告、监控告警。

你们现在的最小落地版本，不需要真多 Agent，只要新增一层“需求编译层”：

IM/自然语言
  -> intent-gateway
  -> IntentSpec / TaskSpec
  -> source-planner
  -> query-api
  -> fetch / normalize / quality / publish
  -> reply/report/monitor

IntentSpec 可以先很简单，比如：

{
  "intent": "topic.monitor",
  "subject": {
    "type": "person",
    "name": "朱一龙",
    "aliases": ["朱一龙", "Zhu Yilong"]
  },
  "sources": ["weibo", "xiaohongshu", "douyin", "bilibili", "news"],
  "time_range": {"mode": "last_30d"},
  "actions": ["search", "fetch_detail", "aggregate", "summarize"],
  "schedule": {"mode": "once"},
  "output": ["timeline", "summary", "evidence"]
}

你们可以分 3 步做，不必一步到位上 Agent：
1. 先做“规则版”
用关键词词典、别名库、意图模板，把“朱一龙最近在做什么”“监控某个保健品舆情”“抓某平台视频和评论”映射成固定 TaskSpec。
2. 再做“轻模型版”
只让小模型做槽位补全和歧义消解，强制输出 JSON，不允许直接调浏览器。
3. 最后才做“有限规划版”
只在复杂研究任务里加 planner，让它决定任务组合，但执行仍然走你们现有 worker，不让模型碰底层浏览器控制。

如果按你们当前架构来放，我建议新增两个组件就够了：
- services/intent-gateway
负责自然语言 -> IntentSpec
- packages/task-spec 或 packages/source-registry
负责定义任务 DSL、源站路由、任务到 worker 的映射

一句话总结：BettaFish 对你们最大的价值，不是“多 Agent 很炫”，而是证明了“用户问题 -> 结构化研究计划 -> 专用执行引擎 -> 报告 IR”这条链是对的。你们现在最该补的是这条链的前两段。

另外提醒一句，BettaFish 的 LICENSE 里我看到是 GPL v2 文本，并且还附带了额外的非商用学习条款，如果你们后面要商业化或闭源，建议只借架构思路，不直接拷代码。
来源：
- BettaFish README: https://github.com/666ghj/BettaFish/blob/main/README.md
- BettaFish 原始 README: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/666ghj/BettaFish/main/README.md
- BettaFish LICENSE: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/666ghj/BettaFish/main/LICENSE

如果你愿意，我下一步可以直接帮你把这套“intent-gateway + TaskSpec”写成一版正式架构文档，接到你现在的 [统一风控对抗平台架构方案](d:/demo1/papaweb/docs/plan/统一风控对抗平台架构方案.md) 里。

turn_context #421 05:15:19
model=gpt-5.4cwd=d:\demo1\papawebcurrent_date=2026-03-21timezone=Asia/Shanghaiapproval_policy=never
Show context payload 
{
  "turn_id": "019d0ed1-bc64-7781-9801-ae9600a03a25",
  "cwd": "d:\\demo1\\papaweb",
  "current_date": "2026-03-21",
  "timezone": "Asia/Shanghai",
  "approval_policy": "never",
  "sandbox_policy": {
    "type": "danger-full-access"
  },
  "model": "gpt-5.4",
  "personality": "friendly",
  "collaboration_mode": {
    "mode": "default",
    "settings": {
      "model": "gpt-5.4",
      "reasoning_effort": "xhigh",
      "developer_instructions": "# Collaboration Mode: Default\r\n\r\nYou are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.\r\n\r\nYour active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.\r\n\r\n## request_user_input availability\r\n\r\nThe `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.\r\n\r\nIn Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.\r\n"
    }
  },
  "realtime_active": false,
  "effort": "xhigh",
  "summary": "none",
  "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md\n\n## 1) 目标\n本文件定义 `papaweb` 团队开发协作规则，适用于本地团队与所有自动化代理。\n\n## 2) 分支模型\n- `main`：生产/发布分支，只接收经过验证的发布变更。\n- `dev`：日常集成分支，所有功能先合入此分支。\n- `feature/*`：新功能分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。\n- `fix/*`：缺陷修复分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。\n- `release/*`：发布准备分支，从 `dev` 切出；验证通过后 PR 合入 `main`，随后回合 `dev`。\n- `hotfix/*`：线上紧急修复分支，从 `main` 切出，先合入 `main`，再回合 `dev`。\n\n## 3) 推送与 PR 规则（强约束）\n- 禁止直接 push 到 `main`。\n- 禁止直接 push 到 `dev`。\n- 所有日常开发变更必须通过 PR 合入 `dev`。\n- `main` 只允许来自 `release/*` 或 `hotfix/*` 的 PR。\n- 每个 PR 至少 1 名 reviewer 审核通过后才能合并。\n\n## 4) CI / E2E 准入规则\n- PR 合并到 `dev` 前，必须满足：\n- `ci` 检查通过（单元测试、静态检查）。\n- `e2e` 检查通过（端到端关键路径）。\n- 任一检查失败，禁止合并。\n- 禁止以“先合并后补测”为理由绕过。\n\n## 5) TDD（测试驱动开发）规则\n- 必须执行 `Red -> Green -> Refactor` 三步：\n- `Red`：先写测试并确认失败。\n- `Green`：写最小实现让测试通过。\n- `Refactor`：重构代码并保持测试持续通过。\n- 修复 bug 时，必须先补回归测试，再改业务代码。\n- 新增功能 PR，至少包含：\n- 1 个单元测试。\n- 1 个集成测试或 E2E 用例（覆盖主流程）。\n- 禁止删除/跳过测试来“凑绿灯”。\n\n## 6) PR 必填信息\n- 变更目的与范围。\n- 验收标准（可观察结果）。\n- 测试证据（执行命令与结果）。\n- 风险点与回滚方案。\n- 若影响使用方式，需同步更新文档。\n\n## 7) 合并策略\n- 默认使用 `Squash merge`，保持历史清晰。\n- Commit message 建议使用 Conventional Commits（如 `feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`）。\n\n## 8) 本地防护建议（必配）\n- 所有人本地安装 `pre-push` hook，拦截推送到 `main`/`dev`。\n- 推荐规则：若目标分支是 `main` 或 `dev`，直接拒绝并提示走 PR。\n\n## 9) 紧急例外流程\n- 仅 `hotfix/*` 可走紧急流程。\n- 需在 PR 描述中写明原因、风险、回滚步骤。\n- 紧急修复合入 `main` 后，必须在 24 小时内回合到 `dev` 并补齐测试。\n\n---\n\n## 10) MemoryTree 项目记忆\n\n本仓库使用 MemoryTree 管理项目级记忆，结构位于 `Memory/` 目录。\n\n### 读取顺序\n1. 本文件 `AGENTS.md`\n2. `Memory/01_goals/` 中最新的目标文件\n3. `Memory/02_todos/` 中绑定该目标的最新待办\n4. `Memory/04_knowledge/` 仅在需要时读取\n5. `Memory/03_chat_logs/` 和 `Memory/05_archive/` 仅在需要时读取\n\n### 活跃文件规则\n- `01_goals/`：目标变更需用户确认后才创建新版本，日常进展不触发新版本。\n- `02_todos/`：进度变化、里程碑推进、下一步任务变更时更新当前待办。\n- `03_chat_logs/`：仅追加，不修改或删除已有记录。\n\n## 11) MemoryTree 提交与 PR 流程\n\nMemoryTree 变更使用独立的提交和 PR 流程，不与产品代码混合。\n\n### 提交规则\n- 仅暂存 MemoryTree 管辖文件：`Memory/**` 和 `AGENTS.md`（经用户确认时）。\n- Commit 标题使用 `docs(memorytree): <描述>`，兼容本仓库 Conventional Commits 规范。\n- 禁止在同一提交中混入产品代码。\n\n### 分支与 PR\n- 使用专用分支：`memorytree/<scope>-<yyyymmdd>-<slug>`。\n- PR 目标分支遵循仓库规则（日常合入 `dev`）。\n- 仅在仓库仍执行必要审核和 CI 检查时，才可启用 auto-merge。\n\n## 12) MemoryTree 安全规则\n\n- 不得绕过本仓库的分支保护、PR 审核或 CI 准入规则。\n- 不得直接推送到 `main` 或 `dev`。\n- 若 diff 包含 MemoryTree 管辖范围外的文件，必须停下并询问用户。\n- 原始转录文件（`Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**`）在用户明确批准前不自动暂存或推送。\n",
  "truncation_policy": {
    "mode": "tokens",
    "limit": 10000
  }
}
user #422 05:15:19

# Context from my IDE setup:

## Active file: docs/plan/统一风控对抗平台架构方案.md

## Open tabs:
- 统一风控对抗平台架构方案.md: docs/plan/统一风控对抗平台架构方案.md

## My request for Codex:
我们家复制拷贝代码，是借鉴开源思路。我们这一层的agent 是可以根据不同类型的提问 进行选择或者重新编辑agent的 可以吗。这样针对不同类型的提问，我们才会更有针对性。因为用户有时候，就算是普通的搜索，不是长期的的任务。但是呢，我们的项目定位的就是长期调研 跟踪的，需要循环执行 查询调用某一件事情的。比如 什么牌迭代洗衣机最好用，我们需要长期跟踪这个信息，比如youtube x rediit，抖音， 国内的新媒体平台，视频博主的评测，用户的评论回复等等。

token_count #423 05:15:23
total_tokens=4412757
total 4412757in 4995623out 103551reason 31343
reasoning #424 05:15:43
Private reasoning captured; content is encrypted.

assistant #425 commentary 05:15:44

这层完全可以做，而且我觉得这正是你们该做的方向：不是只有一个“大而全”的 Agent，而是做成“按问题类型切换 Agent Profile + 编译成不同执行模式”。

assistant #426 final_answer 05:16:02

可以，而且我建议你们就这么做。 但我会把它定义成“选择或装配不同的 Agent Profile”，而不是让一个大模型每次自由重写自己。前者稳定、可控、可审计；后者很容易失控，尤其你们是长期运行型系统。 你们更合适的形态是： ```text 用户问题 -> Intent Router -> 选择 Agent Profile -> 生成 TaskSpec / WorkflowSpec -> 调现有抓取与处理流水线 -> 一次性回答 或...

Expand full message

可以，而且我建议你们就这么做。

但我会把它定义成“选择或装配不同的 Agent Profile”，而不是让一个大模型每次自由重写自己。前者稳定、可控、可审计；后者很容易失控，尤其你们是长期运行型系统。

你们更合适的形态是：

用户问题
  -> Intent Router
  -> 选择 Agent Profile
  -> 生成 TaskSpec / WorkflowSpec
  -> 调现有抓取与处理流水线
  -> 一次性回答 或 持续监控任务

核心不是“一个 Agent 干所有事”，而是“同一个入口，分发到不同策略型 Agent”。

我建议至少拆成这 5 类：

- SearchAgent
适合一次性搜索、快速回答、最近动态
例子：“朱一龙最近在做什么”
- ResearchAgent
适合跨平台调研、主题梳理、证据汇总
例子：“什么牌子的迭代洗衣机最好用”
- MonitorAgent
适合长期跟踪、循环执行、增量更新
例子：“持续跟踪某保健品舆情 30 天”
- MediaAgent
适合视频、评论、作者动态、媒体内容采集
例子：“抓这个平台某热视频和评论”
- CompareAgent
适合竞品对比、口碑归因、观点分层
例子：“A 品牌和 B 品牌洗衣机在海外评测里谁更稳”

你们项目的重点其实不是“搜索”，而是“把搜索升级成长期研究任务”。所以每次用户输入后，系统要先判断它属于哪种运行模式：

- Quick
一次性回答，不建长期任务
- Research
拉一次全网调研，输出报告
- Watch
建立持续任务，按小时/天循环执行
- Campaign
围绕一个主题长期积累证据、持续修正结论

比如你说的这个：
“什么牌迭代洗衣机最好用”

它不应该只被当成一次搜索，而应该被编译成一个长期研究主题：

{
  "intent": "topic.research",
  "topic": "迭代洗衣机哪个好用",
  "facets": ["专业评测", "用户评论", "故障反馈", "售后体验", "价格变化"],
  "sources": ["youtube", "x", "reddit", "bilibili", "douyin", "xiaohongshu", "zhihu"],
  "mode": "watch",
  "schedule": "daily",
  "outputs": ["阶段报告", "趋势变化", "观点分布", "证据链接"]
}

这样一来，Agent 层就不是“聊天机器人”，而是“任务编译器 + 任务经理”。

我更推荐你们把“重新编辑 Agent”限制在这几种可控维度里：

- Prompt Profile
不同任务类型加载不同提示词模板
- Source Policy
不同任务选不同平台与优先级
- Workflow Template
不同任务编译成不同 SOP
- Output Contract
有的输出摘要，有的输出报告，有的输出监控告警
- Schedule Policy
决定是一次性执行还是周期执行

也就是说，不是改 Agent 本体，而是改 Agent 的“配置包”。

结合你们现在仓库，我觉得最自然的增量方案是：

1. 在 query-api 前面加一个 intent-gateway
负责自然语言分类、抽槽位、选择 Agent Profile
2. 新增一个 task-compiler
把用户提问编译成 TaskSpec / WorkflowSpec
3. 继续复用你们现在的
query-api -> fetch -> normalize -> quality -> publish
4. 在旁边再加一个 monitor-scheduler
专门负责长期循环任务、增量抓取、周期总结

最终结构会更像这样：

IM / Web / API
  -> Intent Router
  -> Agent Profile Selector
  -> Task Compiler
  -> Execution Pipeline
  -> Topic Memory / Evidence Store
  -> Report / Alert / Reply

所以答案是：

可以，而且应该这么做。
你们不应该只有一个 Agent，而应该有“多种任务型 Agent Profile”。
用户的提问先被分类，再决定走“一次性搜索”还是“长期研究/跟踪”。

如果你愿意，我下一步可以直接帮你把这个补成你们文档里正式的一章：
第 0 层：Intent Router / Agent Profile / Task Compiler
把它接到现在这份架构方案前面。

  "turn_id": "019d0ed8-6f58-7611-9439-8833af1520f2",

      "developer_instructions": "# Collaboration Mode: Default\r\n\r\nYou are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.\r\n\r\nYour active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.\r\n\r\n## request_user_input availability\r\n\r\nThe `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.\r\n\r\nIn Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.\r\n"
    }
  },
  "realtime_active": false,
